We assess the performance of HiClass on a gastric biopsy dataset with 4 coarse-grained and 14 fine-grained classes, achieving superior classification performance for both coarse-grained classification and fine-grained classification. These results demonstrate the effectiveness of HiClass in improving WSI classification by capturing coarse-grained and fine-grained histopathological characteristics.

AI.tldr: HiClass：一种用于病理学全切片图像分析的层次分类框架，通过双向特征集成和定制损失函数改进粗粒度和细粒度分类性能
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法主要依赖扁平分类，忽略了类别标签之间的层次关系。病理学全切片图像分析对诊断任务至关重要，需要同时考虑粗粒度和细粒度的分类信息。
AI.method: 基于多实例学习方法构建，引入双向特征集成促进粗粒度和细粒度特征表示之间的信息交换，有效学习层次特征。采用定制损失函数：层次一致性损失、类内和类间距离损失、分组交叉熵损失来优化层次学习。
AI.result: 在包含4个粗粒度类别和14个细粒度类别的胃活检数据集上评估，HiClass在粗粒度和细粒度分类上都取得了优越的分类性能。
AI.conclusion: HiClass通过捕捉粗粒度和细粒度组织病理学特征，有效改进了全切片图像分类，证明了层次分类框架在病理学图像分析中的有效性。

title: LexChronos: An Agentic Framework for Structured Event Timeline Extraction in Indian Jurisprudence
summary: Understanding and predicting judicial outcomes demands nuanced analysis of legal documents. Traditional approaches treat judgments and proceedings as unstructured text, limiting the effectiveness of large language models (LLMs) in tasks such as summarization, argument generation, and judgment prediction. We propose LexChronos, an agentic framework that iteratively extracts structured event timelines from Supreme Court of India judgments. LexChronos employs a dual-agent architecture: a LoRA-instruct-tuned extraction agent identifies candidate events, while a pre-trained feedback agent scores and refines them through a confidence-driven loop. To address the scarcity of Indian legal event datasets, we construct a synthetic corpus of 2000 samples using reverse-engineering techniques with DeepSeek-R1 and GPT-4, generating gold-standard event annotations. Our pipeline achieves a BERT-based F1 score of 0.8751 against this synthetic ground truth. In downstream evaluations on legal text summarization, GPT-4 preferred structured timelines over unstructured baselines in 75% of cases, demonstrating improved comprehension and reasoning in Indian jurisprudence. This work lays a foundation for future legal AI applications in the Indian context, such as precedent mapping, argument synthesis, and predictive judgment modelling, by harnessing structured representations of legal events.

AI.tldr: LexChronos是一个从印度最高法院判决书中提取结构化事件时间线的智能代理框架，通过双代理架构和合成数据集训练，显著提升了法律文本理解和推理能力。
AI.motivation: 传统方法将法律判决和程序视为非结构化文本，限制了大型语言模型在法律摘要、论点生成和判决预测等任务中的有效性。印度法律事件数据集的稀缺也阻碍了相关AI应用的发展。
AI.method: 提出LexChronos框架：1) 使用LoRA指令微调的提取代理识别候选事件；2) 预训练的反馈代理通过置信度驱动循环对事件进行评分和优化；3) 使用DeepSeek-R1和GPT-4通过逆向工程技术构建包含2000个样本的合成语料库，生成黄金标准事件标注。
AI.result: 1) 在合成基准上获得BERT-based F1分数0.8751；2) 在法律文本摘要任务中，GPT-4在75%的情况下偏好结构化时间线而非非结构化基线；3) 显著提升了印度法理学的理解和推理能力。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为印度语境下的未来法律AI应用（如先例映射、论点合成和预测性判决建模）奠定了基础，通过利用法律事件的结构化表示来推动法律人工智能的发展。

title: SEED-SET: Scalable Evolving Experimental Design for System-level Ethical Testing
comment: 10 main pages along with Appendix containing additional results, manuscript accepted in ICLR 2026
summary: As autonomous systems such as drones, become increasingly deployed in high-stakes, human-centric domains, it is critical to evaluate the ethical alignment since failure to do so imposes imminent danger to human lives, and long term bias in decision-making. Automated ethical benchmarking of these systems is understudied due to the lack of ubiquitous, well-defined metrics for evaluation, and stakeholder-specific subjectivity, which cannot be modeled analytically. To address these challenges, we propose SEED-SET, a Bayesian experimental design framework that incorporates domain-specific objective evaluations, and subjective value judgments from stakeholders. SEED-SET models both evaluation types separately with hierarchical Gaussian Processes, and uses a novel acquisition strategy to propose interesting test candidates based on learnt qualitative preferences and objectives that align with the stakeholder preferences. We validate our approach for ethical benchmarking of autonomous agents on two applications and find our method to perform the best. Our method provides an interpretable and efficient trade-off between exploration and exploitation, by generating up to $2\times$ optimal test candidates compared to baselines, with $1.25\times$ improvement in coverage of high dimensional search spaces.

AI.tldr: SEED-SET：一种贝叶斯实验设计框架，用于自主系统的伦理基准测试，通过结合客观评估和利益相关者的主观价值判断来生成最优测试候选
AI.motivation: 自主系统（如无人机）在关键人类中心领域部署时，伦理对齐评估至关重要。现有方法面临缺乏普遍评估指标、利益相关者主观性难以建模等挑战
AI.method: 提出SEED-SET框架，使用分层高斯过程分别建模客观评估和主观价值判断，采用新颖的采集策略基于学习到的定性偏好和利益相关者偏好生成测试候选
AI.result: 在两个自主代理伦理基准测试应用中验证，性能最佳：生成高达2倍最优测试候选，高维搜索空间覆盖度提升1.25倍，在探索与利用间提供可解释高效权衡
AI.conclusion: SEED-SET为自主系统伦理基准测试提供了一种有效框架，能够结合客观和主观评估，生成符合利益相关者偏好的测试场景

title: What Do Visual Tokens Really Encode? Uncovering Sparsity and Redundancy in Multimodal Large Language Models
summary: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) project visual tokens into the embedding space of language models, yet the internal structuring and processing of visual semantics remain poorly understood. In this work, we introduce a two-fold analytical framework featuring a novel probing tool, $\textbf{EmbedLens}$, to conduct a fine-grained analysis. We uncover a pronounced semantic sparsity at the input level: visual tokens consistently partition into sink, dead, and alive categories. Remarkably, only the alive tokens, comprising $\approx60\%$ of the total input, carry image-specific meaning. Furthermore, using a targeted patch-compression benchmark, we demonstrate that these alive tokens already encode rich, fine-grained cues (e.g., objects, colors, and OCR) prior to entering the LLM. Internal visual computations (such as visual attention and feed-forward networks) are redundant for most standard tasks. For the small subset of highly vision-centric tasks that actually benefit from internal processing, we reveal that alive tokens naturally align with intermediate LLM layers rather than the initial embedding space, indicating that shallow-layer processing is unnecessary and that direct mid-layer injection is both sufficient. Ultimately, our findings provide a unified mechanistic view of visual token processing, paving the way for more efficient and interpretable MLLM architectures through selective token pruning, minimized visual computation, and mid-layer injection. The code is released at: https://github.com/EIT-NLP/EmbedLens.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出EmbedLens工具分析MLLM视觉语义处理，发现视觉令牌存在语义稀疏性，仅约60%的"活跃令牌"携带图像特定信息，且内部视觉计算对多数任务冗余，建议通过令牌剪枝、减少视觉计算和中层注入提升效率。
AI.motivation: 多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）将视觉令牌投影到语言模型的嵌入空间，但视觉语义的内部结构化和处理机制仍不清楚。需要深入理解视觉语义在MLLM中的处理方式，以构建更高效和可解释的架构。
AI.method: 提出两阶段分析框架，开发新颖的探测工具EmbedLens进行细粒度分析。使用定向补丁压缩基准测试验证活跃令牌的语义丰富性，分析内部视觉计算（如视觉注意力和前馈网络）的冗余性，并探索视觉令牌与LLM中间层的对齐关系。
AI.result: 发现视觉令牌在输入层面存在显著的语义稀疏性：分为汇点、死亡和活跃三类，仅约60%的活跃令牌携带图像特定含义。这些活跃令牌在进入LLM前已编码丰富的细粒度线索。内部视觉计算对大多数标准任务冗余，对于少数高度视觉中心的任务，活跃令牌自然对齐于LLM中间层而非初始嵌入空间。
AI.conclusion: 研究提供了视觉令牌处理的统一机制视角，为通过选择性令牌剪枝、最小化视觉计算和中层注入来构建更高效和可解释的MLLM架构铺平了道路。

title: Beyond the Grid: Layout-Informed Multi-Vector Retrieval with Parsed Visual Document Representations
summary: Harnessing the full potential of visually-rich documents requires retrieval systems that understand not just text, but intricate layouts, a core challenge in Visual Document Retrieval (VDR). The prevailing multi-vector architectures, while powerful, face a crucial storage bottleneck that current optimization strategies, such as embedding merging, pruning, or using abstract tokens, fail to resolve without compromising performance or ignoring vital layout cues. To address this, we introduce ColParse, a novel paradigm that leverages a document parsing model to generate a small set of layout-informed sub-image embeddings, which are then fused with a global page-level vector to create a compact and structurally-aware multi-vector representation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method reduces storage requirements by over 95% while simultaneously yielding significant performance gains across numerous benchmarks and base models. ColParse thus bridges the critical gap between the fine-grained accuracy of multi-vector retrieval and the practical demands of large-scale deployment, offering a new path towards efficient and interpretable multimodal information systems.

AI.tldr: ColParse是一种新的视觉文档检索方法，通过文档解析模型生成少量布局感知的子图像嵌入，与全局页面向量融合，在减少95%以上存储需求的同时提升检索性能。
AI.motivation: 当前多向量架构在视觉文档检索中存在严重的存储瓶颈，现有优化策略（如嵌入合并、剪枝或使用抽象标记）要么会损害性能，要么忽略了重要的布局信息，无法在不妥协的情况下解决存储问题。
AI.method: ColParse利用文档解析模型生成少量布局感知的子图像嵌入，然后将这些嵌入与全局页面级向量融合，创建紧凑且结构感知的多向量表示。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法减少了超过95%的存储需求，同时在多个基准测试和基础模型上实现了显著的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: ColParse在多向量检索的细粒度准确性和大规模部署的实际需求之间架起了关键桥梁，为高效且可解释的多模态信息系统提供了新路径。

title: Learning Structured Reasoning via Tractable Trajectory Control
summary: Large language models can exhibit emergent reasoning behaviors, often manifested as recurring lexical patterns (e.g., "wait," indicating verification). However, complex reasoning trajectories remain sparse in unconstrained sampling, and standard RL often fails to guarantee the acquisition of diverse reasoning behaviors. We propose a systematic discovery and reinforcement of diverse reasoning patterns through structured reasoning, a paradigm that requires targeted exploration of specific reasoning patterns during the RL process. To this end, we propose Ctrl-R, a framework for learning structured reasoning via tractable trajectory control that actively guides the rollout process, incentivizing the exploration of diverse reasoning patterns that are critical for complex problem-solving. The resulting behavior policy enables accurate importance-sampling estimation, supporting unbiased on-policy optimization. We further introduce a power-scaling factor on the importance-sampling weights, allowing the policy to selectively learn from exploratory, out-of-distribution trajectories while maintaining stable optimization. Experiments demonstrate that Ctrl-R enables effective exploration and internalization of previously unattainable reasoning patterns, yielding consistent improvements across language and vision-language models on mathematical reasoning tasks.

AI.tldr: Ctrl-R框架通过结构化推理轨迹控制，引导LLM探索多样化的推理模式，提升复杂问题解决能力
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型虽然能展现推理能力，但复杂推理轨迹在无约束采样中稀疏，标准强化学习难以保证获得多样化的推理行为
AI.method: 提出Ctrl-R框架，通过可处理的轨迹控制主动引导rollout过程，激励探索多样化的推理模式；引入重要性采样权重幂缩放因子，让策略有选择地从探索性轨迹中学习
AI.result: Ctrl-R能有效探索和内化先前无法获得的推理模式，在数学推理任务上对语言模型和视觉语言模型都带来一致改进
AI.conclusion: 结构化推理轨迹控制是提升LLM复杂推理能力的有效方法，Ctrl-R框架通过引导探索和稳定优化实现了这一目标

title: Multimodal Adaptive Retrieval Augmented Generation through Internal Representation Learning
summary: Visual Question Answering systems face reliability issues due to hallucinations, where models generate answers misaligned with visual input or factual knowledge. While Retrieval Augmented Generation frameworks mitigate this issue by incorporating external knowledge, static retrieval often introduces irrelevant or conflicting content, particularly in visual RAG settings where visually similar but semantically incorrect evidence may be retrieved. To address this, we propose Multimodal Adaptive RAG (MMA-RAG), which dynamically assesses the confidence in the internal knowledge of the model to decide whether to incorporate the retrieved external information into the generation process. Central to MMA-RAG is a decision classifier trained through a layer-wise analysis, which leverages joint internal visual and textual representations to guide the use of reverse image retrieval. Experiments demonstrated that the model achieves a significant improvement in response performance in three VQA datasets. Meanwhile, ablation studies highlighted the importance of internal representations in adaptive retrieval decisions. In general, the experimental results demonstrated that MMA-RAG effectively balances external knowledge utilization and inference robustness in diverse multimodal scenarios.

AI.tldr: MMA-RAG提出了一种多模态自适应检索增强生成框架，通过动态评估模型内部知识置信度来决定是否整合外部检索信息，以解决VQA系统中的幻觉问题。
AI.motivation: 视觉问答系统存在幻觉问题，模型生成的答案与视觉输入或事实知识不一致。虽然检索增强生成框架通过引入外部知识缓解这一问题，但静态检索常常引入不相关或冲突的内容，特别是在视觉RAG设置中，可能检索到视觉相似但语义错误的证据。
AI.method: 提出多模态自适应RAG（MMA-RAG），通过训练决策分类器动态评估模型内部知识置信度，决定是否将检索的外部信息整合到生成过程中。该分类器基于层级分析，利用联合的内部视觉和文本表示来指导反向图像检索的使用。
AI.result: 实验表明，该模型在三个VQA数据集上显著提高了响应性能。消融研究强调了内部表示在自适应检索决策中的重要性。
AI.conclusion: MMA-RAG在多模态场景中有效平衡了外部知识利用和推理鲁棒性，通过自适应检索机制减少了幻觉问题。

title: Surgical Post-Training: Cutting Errors, Keeping Knowledge
summary: Enhancing the reasoning capabilities of Large Language Models (LLMs) via post-training is often constrained by the trade-off between efficiency and catastrophic forgetting. While prior research emphasizes the role of on-policy data in mitigating forgetting, we uncover--and validate both theoretically and empirically--an overlooked yet critical mechanism: the implicit regularization inherent in Direct Preference Optimization's (DPO) reward estimate. This motivates our Surgical Post-Training (SPoT), a new paradigm designed to optimize reasoning efficiently while preserving learned prior knowledge. SPoT consists of: (1) a data rectification pipeline that employs an Oracle to surgically correct erroneous steps via minimal edits, generating data proximal to the model's distribution; and (2) a reward-based binary cross-entropy objective. Unlike the relative ranking in DPO, this objective treats reasoning correctness as a binary classification problem, enforcing decoupled supervision signals. Empirically, with only 4k rectified math data pairs, SPoT improves Qwen3-8B's accuracy by 6.2% on average across in-domain and OOD tasks, requiring merely 28 minutes of training on 8x H800 GPUs. Code: https://github.com/Visual-AI/SPoT

AI.tldr: SPoT提出了一种新的后训练范式，通过数据修正和二元交叉熵目标，在仅需少量数据和短时间训练的情况下，显著提升LLM的推理能力，同时避免灾难性遗忘。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM后训练方法在提升推理能力时面临效率与灾难性遗忘的权衡问题。作者发现DPO奖励估计中的隐式正则化机制被忽视，这为解决该问题提供了新思路。
AI.method: SPoT包含两个核心组件：1) 数据修正管道，使用Oracle对错误推理步骤进行最小化编辑，生成接近模型分布的数据；2) 基于奖励的二元交叉熵目标，将推理正确性视为二元分类问题，提供解耦的监督信号。
AI.result: 仅使用4k修正数学数据对，SPoT在8×H800 GPU上训练28分钟，使Qwen3-8B在领域内和领域外任务上的平均准确率提升6.2%。
AI.conclusion: SPoT通过利用DPO的隐式正则化机制，提出了一种高效的后训练范式，能够在极小计算成本下显著提升LLM推理能力，同时保持已学知识。

title: CeProAgents: A Hierarchical Agents System for Automated Chemical Process Development
summary: The development of chemical processes, a cornerstone of chemical engineering, presents formidable challenges due to its multi-faceted nature, integrating specialized knowledge, conceptual design, and parametric simulation. Capitalizing on this, we propose CeProAgents, a hierarchical multi-agent system designed to automate the development of chemical process through collaborative division of labor. Our architecture comprises three specialized agent cohorts focused on knowledge, concept, and parameter respectively. To effectively adapt to the inherent complexity of chemical tasks, each cohort employs a novel hybrid architecture that integrates dynamic agent chatgroups with structured agentic workflows. To rigorously evaluate the system, we establish CeProBench, a multi-dimensional benchmark structured around three core pillars of chemical engineering. We design six distinct types of tasks across these dimensions to holistically assess the comprehensive capabilities of the system in chemical process development. The results not only confirm the effectiveness and superiority of our proposed approach but also reveal the transformative potential as well as the current boundaries of Large Language Models (LLMs) for industrial chemical engineering.

AI.tldr: CeProAgents是一个分层多智能体系统，通过知识、概念和参数三个专业智能体群组的协作分工，自动化化学过程开发。系统采用动态聊天群组与结构化工作流结合的混合架构，并在CeProBench基准测试中验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 化学过程开发作为化学工程的基石，面临多方面的挑战，需要整合专业知识、概念设计和参数模拟。传统方法复杂且耗时，需要自动化解决方案来提高效率和准确性。
AI.method: 提出CeProAgents分层多智能体系统，包含知识、概念和参数三个专业智能体群组。采用动态智能体聊天群组与结构化智能体工作流相结合的混合架构，适应化学任务的复杂性。建立CeProBench多维度基准，围绕化学工程三个核心支柱设计六种任务类型进行评估。
AI.result: 结果证实了所提方法的有效性和优越性，同时揭示了大型语言模型在工业化学工程中的变革潜力以及当前边界。
AI.conclusion: CeProAgents系统成功实现了化学过程开发的自动化，展示了多智能体协作在复杂工程任务中的价值，为LLM在工业化学工程中的应用开辟了新途径。

title: Wavelet-based Frame Selection by Detecting Semantic Boundary for Long Video Understanding
summary: Frame selection is crucial due to high frame redundancy and limited context windows when applying Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) to long videos. Current methods typically select frames with high relevance to a given query, resulting in a disjointed set of frames that disregard the narrative structure of video. In this paper, we introduce Wavelet-based Frame Selection by Detecting Semantic Boundary (WFS-SB), a training-free framework that presents a new perspective: effective video understanding hinges not only on high relevance but, more importantly, on capturing semantic shifts - pivotal moments of narrative change that are essential to comprehending the holistic storyline of video. However, direct detection of abrupt changes in the query-frame similarity signal is often unreliable due to high-frequency noise arising from model uncertainty and transient visual variations. To address this, we leverage the wavelet transform, which provides an ideal solution through its multi-resolution analysis in both time and frequency domains. By applying this transform, we decompose the noisy signal into multiple scales and extract a clean semantic change signal from the coarsest scale. We identify the local extrema of this signal as semantic boundaries, which segment the video into coherent clips. Building on this, WFS-SB comprises a two-stage strategy: first, adaptively allocating a frame budget to each clip based on a composite importance score; and second, within each clip, employing the Maximal Marginal Relevance approach to select a diverse yet relevant set of frames. Extensive experiments show that WFS-SB significantly boosts LVLM performance, e.g., improving accuracy by 5.5% on VideoMME, 9.5% on MLVU, and 6.2% on LongVideoBench, consistently outperforming state-of-the-art methods.

AI.tldr: 提出WFS-SB框架，通过小波变换检测语义边界来分割视频，再自适应分配帧预算并选择多样化相关帧，显著提升LVLM在长视频理解上的性能。
AI.motivation: 当前长视频理解方法通常只选择与查询高度相关的帧，忽略了视频的叙事结构。有效视频理解不仅需要高相关性，更需要捕捉语义转变的关键时刻。
AI.method: 提出WFS-SB训练免费框架：1) 使用小波变换分解查询-帧相似度信号，从最粗尺度提取干净语义变化信号，检测局部极值作为语义边界分割视频；2) 基于复合重要性分数自适应分配帧预算；3) 在每个片段内使用最大边际相关性方法选择多样化相关帧。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中显著提升LVLM性能：VideoMME准确率提升5.5%，MLVU提升9.5%，LongVideoBench提升6.2%，一致优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: WFS-SB通过检测语义边界和自适应帧选择，有效捕捉视频叙事结构，为长视频理解提供了新视角，显著提升大视觉语言模型的视频理解能力。

title: QIME: Constructing Interpretable Medical Text Embeddings via Ontology-Grounded Questions
summary: While dense biomedical embeddings achieve strong performance, their black-box nature limits their utility in clinical decision-making. Recent question-based interpretable embeddings represent text as binary answers to natural-language questions, but these approaches often rely on heuristic or surface-level contrastive signals and overlook specialized domain knowledge. We propose QIME, an ontology-grounded framework for constructing interpretable medical text embeddings in which each dimension corresponds to a clinically meaningful yes/no question. By conditioning on cluster-specific medical concept signatures, QIME generates semantically atomic questions that capture fine-grained distinctions in biomedical text. Furthermore, QIME supports a training-free embedding construction strategy that eliminates per-question classifier training while further improving performance. Experiments across biomedical semantic similarity, clustering, and retrieval benchmarks show that QIME consistently outperforms prior interpretable embedding methods and substantially narrows the gap to strong black-box biomedical encoders, while providing concise and clinically informative explanations.

AI.tldr: QIME：基于本体论的可解释医学文本嵌入框架，将文本表示为临床意义问题的二进制答案，无需训练即可构建嵌入，性能接近黑盒模型
AI.motivation: 现有生物医学嵌入模型虽然性能强大，但黑盒特性限制了其在临床决策中的应用。基于问题的可解释嵌入方法通常依赖启发式或表层对比信号，忽略了专业领域知识
AI.method: 提出QIME框架，基于本体论构建可解释医学文本嵌入，每个维度对应一个临床意义的yes/no问题。通过基于聚类特定医学概念签名生成语义原子问题，捕获生物医学文本的细粒度差异。支持免训练嵌入构建策略，无需每个问题的分类器训练
AI.result: 在生物医学语义相似性、聚类和检索基准测试中，QIME始终优于先前的可解释嵌入方法，显著缩小了与强大黑盒生物医学编码器的性能差距，同时提供简洁且临床信息丰富的解释
AI.conclusion: QIME通过结合本体论知识和免训练策略，实现了高性能且可解释的生物医学文本嵌入，为临床决策提供了透明且信息丰富的工具

title: Chain-of-Context Learning: Dynamic Constraint Understanding for Multi-Task VRPs
comment: This paper is accepted by ICLR 2026
summary: Multi-task Vehicle Routing Problems (VRPs) aim to minimize routing costs while satisfying diverse constraints. Existing solvers typically adopt a unified reinforcement learning (RL) framework to learn generalizable patterns across tasks. However, they often overlook the constraint and node dynamics during the decision process, making the model fail to accurately react to the current context. To address this limitation, we propose Chain-of-Context Learning (CCL), a novel framework that progressively captures the evolving context to guide fine-grained node adaptation. Specifically, CCL constructs step-wise contextual information via a Relevance-Guided Context Reformulation (RGCR) module, which adaptively prioritizes salient constraints. This context then guides node updates through a Trajectory-Shared Node Re-embedding (TSNR) module, which aggregates shared node features from all trajectories' contexts and uses them to update inputs for the next step. By modeling evolving preferences of the RL agent, CCL captures step-by-step dependencies in sequential decision-making. We evaluate CCL on 48 diverse VRP variants, including 16 in-distribution and 32 out-of-distribution (with unseen constraints) tasks. Experimental results show that CCL performs favorably against the state-of-the-art baselines, achieving the best performance on all in-distribution tasks and the majority of out-of-distribution tasks.

AI.tldr: 提出Chain-of-Context Learning (CCL)框架，通过渐进式捕捉演化上下文来指导细粒度节点适应，在多任务车辆路径问题中优于现有方法
AI.motivation: 现有多任务VRP求解器通常采用统一的强化学习框架，但忽略了决策过程中的约束和节点动态变化，导致模型无法准确响应当前上下文
AI.method: 提出CCL框架：1) RGCR模块通过相关性指导的上下文重构自适应地优先处理重要约束；2) TSNR模块聚合所有轨迹上下文中的共享节点特征，用于更新下一步输入
AI.result: 在48个多样化VRP变体上评估，包括16个分布内和32个分布外任务。CCL在所有分布内任务和大多数分布外任务上表现最佳，优于现有最先进方法
AI.conclusion: CCL通过建模RL代理的演化偏好，捕捉序列决策中的逐步依赖关系，能够有效处理多任务VRP中的约束和节点动态变化

title: MLLM-4D: Towards Visual-based Spatial-Temporal Intelligence
summary: Humans are born with vision-based 4D spatial-temporal intelligence, which enables us to perceive and reason about the evolution of 3D space over time from purely visual inputs. Despite its importance, this capability remains a significant bottleneck for current multimodal large language models (MLLMs). To tackle this challenge, we introduce MLLM-4D, a comprehensive framework designed to bridge the gaps in training data curation and model post-training for spatiotemporal understanding and reasoning. On the data front, we develop a cost-efficient data curation pipeline that repurposes existing stereo video datasets into high-quality 4D spatiotemporal instructional data. This results in the MLLM4D-2M and MLLM4D-R1-30k datasets for Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) and Reinforcement Fine-Tuning (RFT), alongside MLLM4D-Bench for comprehensive evaluation. Regarding model training, our post-training strategy establishes a foundational 4D understanding via SFT and further catalyzes 4D reasoning capabilities by employing Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) with specialized Spatiotemporal Chain of Thought (ST-CoT) prompting and Spatiotemporal reward functions (ST-reward) without involving the modification of architecture. Extensive experiments demonstrate that MLLM-4D achieves state-of-the-art spatial-temporal understanding and reasoning capabilities from purely 2D RGB inputs. Project page: https://github.com/GVCLab/MLLM-4D.

AI.tldr: MLLM-4D是一个多模态大语言模型框架，专注于从2D RGB输入中实现4D时空理解和推理能力，通过创新的数据策展和训练策略，无需修改模型架构即可达到最先进的性能。
AI.motivation: 人类天生具备基于视觉的4D时空智能，能够从纯视觉输入中感知和推理3D空间随时间的变化。然而，这种能力是目前多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）的显著瓶颈，需要解决这一挑战。
AI.method: 1) 数据方面：开发了成本高效的数据策展流水线，将现有立体视频数据集转化为高质量的4D时空教学数据，创建了MLLM4D-2M和MLLM4D-R1-30k数据集用于监督微调和强化微调；2) 模型训练：通过监督微调建立基础4D理解，然后使用组相对策略优化（GRPO）配合专门的时空思维链（ST-CoT）提示和时空奖励函数（ST-reward）来催化4D推理能力，无需修改模型架构。
AI.result: MLLM-4D在广泛的实验中表现出最先进的时空理解和推理能力，能够从纯2D RGB输入中实现4D时空智能。
AI.conclusion: MLLM-4D框架成功解决了多模态大语言模型在4D时空理解和推理方面的瓶颈，通过创新的数据策展和训练策略，在不修改模型架构的情况下实现了从2D视觉输入到4D时空智能的有效转化。

title: Building a Strong Instruction Language Model for a Less-Resourced Language
comment: Currently under review at Natural Language Processing Special Issue on Language Models for Low-Resource Languages
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have become an essential tool for natural language processing and artificial intelligence in general. Current open-source models are primarily trained on English texts, resulting in poorer performance on less-resourced languages and cultures. We present a set of methodological approaches necessary for the successful adaptation of an LLM to a less-resourced language, and demonstrate them using the Slovene language. We present GaMS3-12B, a generative model for Slovene with 12 billion parameters, and demonstrate that it is the best-performing open-source model for Slovene within its parameter range. We adapted the model to the Slovene language using three-stage continual pre-training of the Gemma 3 model, followed by two-stage supervised fine-tuning (SFT). We trained the model on a combination of 140B Slovene, English, Bosnian, Serbian, and Croatian pretraining tokens, and over 200 thousand English and Slovene SFT examples. We evaluate GaMS3-12B on the Slovenian-LLM-Eval datasets, English-to-Slovene translation, and the Slovene LLM arena. We show that the described model outperforms 12B Gemma 3 across all three scenarios and performs comparably to much larger commercial GPT-4o in the Slovene LLM arena, achieving a win rate of over 60 %.

AI.tldr: GaMS3-12B是一个针对斯洛文尼亚语优化的12B参数开源大语言模型，通过三阶段持续预训练和两阶段监督微调，在斯洛文尼亚语任务上表现优异，性能接近商业GPT-4o。
AI.motivation: 当前开源大语言模型主要基于英语训练，在资源较少的语言（如斯洛文尼亚语）上表现不佳。需要开发针对特定低资源语言的适配方法，提升这些语言上的模型性能。
AI.method: 采用三阶段持续预训练Gemma 3模型，然后进行两阶段监督微调。训练数据包括140B斯洛文尼亚语、英语、波斯尼亚语、塞尔维亚语和克罗地亚语预训练token，以及超过20万英斯双语监督微调样本。
AI.result: GaMS3-12B在斯洛文尼亚语评估数据集、英斯翻译任务和斯洛文尼亚语竞技场中均优于12B Gemma 3。在斯洛文尼亚语竞技场中，胜率超过60%，性能与更大的商业GPT-4o相当。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法成功将大语言模型适配到低资源语言斯洛文尼亚语，GaMS3-12B成为同参数范围内性能最佳的开源斯洛文尼亚语模型，为其他低资源语言适配提供了可行方案。

title: FT-Dojo: Towards Autonomous LLM Fine-Tuning with Language Agents
summary: Fine-tuning large language models for vertical domains remains a labor-intensive and expensive process, requiring domain experts to curate data, configure training, and iteratively diagnose model behavior. Despite growing interest in autonomous machine learning, no prior work has tackled end-to-end LLM fine-tuning with agents. Can LLM-based agents automate this complete process? We frame this as a substantially open problem: agents must navigate an open-ended search space spanning data curation from diverse data sources, processing with complex tools, building a training pipeline, and iteratively refining their approach based on evaluation outcomes in rapidly growing logs--an overall scenario far more intricate than existing benchmarks. To study this question, we introduce FT-Dojo, an interactive environment comprising 13 tasks across 5 domains. We further develop FT-Agent, an autonomous system that mirrors human experts by leveraging evaluation-driven feedback to iteratively diagnose failures and refine fine-tuning strategies. Experiments on FT-Dojo demonstrate that purpose-built fine-tuning agents significantly outperform general-purpose alternatives, with FT-Agent achieving the best performance on 10 out of 13 tasks across all five domains. Ablations show that the approach generalizes effectively to 3B models, with additional insights on data scaling trade-offs and backbone sensitivity. Case analyses reveal that agents can recover from failures through cumulative learning from historical experience, while also exposing fundamental limitations in causal reasoning--highlighting both the promise and current boundaries of autonomous LLM fine-tuning.

AI.tldr: FT-Dojo环境与FT-Agent系统：首个端到端LLM微调自动化研究，通过评估驱动反馈实现自主数据管理、训练配置与迭代优化，在13个任务中10个表现最佳
AI.motivation: 当前垂直领域大语言模型微调过程仍高度依赖人工，需要领域专家进行数据整理、训练配置和迭代诊断，成本高昂且效率低下。尽管自主机器学习受到关注，但尚无研究实现端到端的LLM微调自动化
AI.method: 提出FT-Dojo交互环境（包含5个领域的13个任务）和FT-Agent自主系统。FT-Agent模拟人类专家，利用评估驱动反馈迭代诊断失败并优化微调策略，涵盖数据收集、处理、训练管道构建等完整流程
AI.result: 实验显示专用微调代理显著优于通用替代方案，FT-Agent在5个领域的13个任务中10个表现最佳。方法可泛化至3B模型，消融研究揭示了数据规模权衡和骨干网络敏感性。案例分析表明代理能从历史经验中学习恢复，但也暴露了因果推理的局限性
AI.conclusion: 研究首次证明了LLM代理能够自动化端到端微调过程，专用代理优于通用方案，但当前仍存在因果推理等根本性限制，展示了自主LLM微调的前景与边界

title: Vision-TTT: Efficient and Expressive Visual Representation Learning with Test-Time Training
summary: Learning efficient and expressive visual representation has long been the pursuit of computer vision research. While Vision Transformers (ViTs) gradually replace traditional Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) as more scalable vision learners, their applications are plagued by the quadratic complexity of the self-attention mechanism. To address the challenge, we introduce a new linear-time sequence modeling method Test-Time Training (TTT) into vision and propose Vision-TTT, which compresses the visual token sequence in a novel self-supervised learning manner. By incorporating bidirectional scan strategy and the Conv2d module, Vision-TTT effectively extends vanilla TTT to model 2D visual correlations with global receptive fields. Extensive experiments show that \texttt{Vittt-T/S/B} achieve 77.3%,81.2%,82.5% Top-1 accuracy on ImageNet classification and also greatly outperform their counterparts on downstream tasks. At 1280x1280 resolution, \texttt{Vittt-T} reduces FLOPs by 79.4% and runs 4.38x faster with 88.9% less memory than DeiT-T. These results demonstrate the expressiveness and efficiency of Vision-TTT as a strong candidate for the next-generation generic visual backbone.

AI.tldr: Vision-TTT是一种新的线性时间序列建模方法，通过自监督学习压缩视觉token序列，在保持全局感受野的同时显著降低计算复杂度，成为下一代通用视觉骨干网络的强有力候选。
AI.motivation: 虽然Vision Transformers逐渐取代传统CNN成为更可扩展的视觉学习器，但其自注意力机制的二次复杂度限制了实际应用。需要一种既能保持表达能力又能降低计算复杂度的新方法。
AI.method: 将Test-Time Training (TTT)引入视觉领域，提出Vision-TTT，通过双向扫描策略和Conv2d模块，以自监督学习方式压缩视觉token序列，将vanilla TTT扩展到建模2D视觉相关性。
AI.result: Vision-TTT-T/S/B在ImageNet分类上分别达到77.3%、81.2%、82.5%的Top-1准确率，在下游任务上大幅超越同类模型。在1280x1280分辨率下，Vision-TTT-T比DeiT-T减少79.4%的FLOPs，运行速度快4.38倍，内存减少88.9%。
AI.conclusion: Vision-TTT展示了作为下一代通用视觉骨干网络的表达能力和效率，是解决ViT二次复杂度问题的有效方案。

title: Legal RAG Bench: an end-to-end benchmark for legal RAG
summary: We introduce Legal RAG Bench, a benchmark and evaluation methodology for assessing the end-to-end performance of legal RAG systems. As a benchmark, Legal RAG Bench consists of 4,876 passages from the Victorian Criminal Charge Book alongside 100 complex, hand-crafted questions demanding expert knowledge of criminal law and procedure. Both long-form answers and supporting passages are provided. As an evaluation methodology, Legal RAG Bench leverages a full factorial design and novel hierarchical error decomposition framework, enabling apples-to-apples comparisons of the contributions of retrieval and reasoning models in RAG. We evaluate three state-of-the-art embedding models (Isaacus' Kanon 2 Embedder, Google's Gemini Embedding 001, and OpenAI's Text Embedding 3 Large) and two frontier LLMs (Gemini 3.1 Pro and GPT-5.2), finding that information retrieval is the primary driver of legal RAG performance, with LLMs exerting a more moderate effect on correctness and groundedness. Kanon 2 Embedder, in particular, had the largest positive impact on performance, improving average correctness by 17.5 points, groundedness by 4.5 points, and retrieval accuracy by 34 points. We observe that many errors attributed to hallucinations in legal RAG systems are in fact triggered by retrieval failures, concluding that retrieval sets the ceiling for the performance of many modern legal RAG systems. We document why and how we built Legal RAG Bench alongside the results of our evaluations. We also openly release our code and data to assist with reproduction of our findings.

AI.tldr: Legal RAG Bench是一个用于评估法律RAG系统端到端性能的基准测试和方法论，包含4,876个法律文本段落和100个复杂法律问题，通过全因子设计和分层错误分解框架分析检索与推理模型的贡献。
AI.motivation: 现有法律RAG系统缺乏标准化的评估基准和方法论，难以准确评估检索和推理组件各自的贡献，特别是无法区分幻觉错误和检索失败。
AI.method: 构建包含维多利亚刑事指控手册4,876个段落和100个复杂法律问题的基准数据集，采用全因子设计实验和分层错误分解框架，评估3种嵌入模型和2种前沿LLM的性能。
AI.result: 检索是法律RAG性能的主要驱动因素，LLM对正确性和基础性的影响相对较小。Kanon 2 Embedder表现最佳，平均正确性提升17.5分，基础性提升4.5分，检索准确率提升34分。许多归因于幻觉的错误实际上由检索失败触发。
AI.conclusion: 检索为现代法律RAG系统的性能设定了上限，改进检索模型比优化LLM更能提升系统性能。研究公开了代码和数据以促进复现。

title: GMP: A Benchmark for Content Moderation under Co-occurring Violations and Dynamic Rules
summary: Online content moderation is essential for maintaining a healthy digital environment, and reliance on AI for this task continues to grow. Consider a user comment using national stereotypes to insult a politician. This example illustrates two critical challenges in real-world scenarios: (1) Co-occurring Violations, where a single post violates multiple policies (e.g., prejudice and personal attacks); (2) Dynamic rules of moderation, where determination of a violation depends on platform-specific guidelines that evolve across contexts . The intersection of co-occurring harms and dynamically changing rules highlights a core limitation of current AI systems: although large language models (LLMs) are adept at following fixed guidelines, their judgment capabilities degrade when policies are unstable or context-dependent . In practice, such shortcomings lead to inconsistent moderation: either erroneously restricting legitimate expression or allowing harmful content to remain online . This raises a critical question for evaluation: Does high performance on existing static benchmarks truly guarantee robust generalization of AI judgment to real-world scenarios involving co-occurring violations and dynamically changing rules?

AI.tldr: 论文指出当前AI内容审核系统在处理同时违反多项政策且规则动态变化的真实场景时存在局限性，现有静态基准测试无法保证AI判断的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 随着AI在内容审核中的广泛应用，现实场景中存在两个关键挑战：1）单一帖子同时违反多项政策（如偏见和个人攻击）；2）平台特定指南随上下文动态变化。当前AI系统在处理这些复杂情况时判断能力下降，导致审核不一致。
AI.method: 论文通过分析具体案例（使用国家刻板印象攻击政治家的评论）来揭示现有AI系统的局限性，并质疑现有静态基准测试的有效性。
AI.result: 研究发现大型语言模型虽然擅长遵循固定指南，但在政策不稳定或上下文依赖时判断能力会下降，导致要么错误限制合法表达，要么允许有害内容留存。
AI.conclusion: 需要重新评估AI内容审核系统的评价方法，现有静态基准测试无法保证AI在涉及同时违反多项政策和动态变化规则的真实场景中的鲁棒性，需要开发更贴近现实复杂性的评估框架。

title: Jano: Adaptive Diffusion Generation with Early-stage Convergence Awareness
summary: Diffusion models have achieved remarkable success in generative AI, yet their computational efficiency remains a significant challenge, particularly for Diffusion Transformers (DiTs) requiring intensive full-attention computation. While existing acceleration approaches focus on content-agnostic uniform optimization strategies, we observe that different regions in generated content exhibit heterogeneous convergence patterns during the denoising process. We present Jano, a training-free framework that leverages this insight for efficient region-aware generation. Jano introduces an early-stage complexity recognition algorithm that accurately identifies regional convergence requirements within initial denoising steps, coupled with an adaptive token scheduling runtime that optimizes computational resource allocation. Through comprehensive evaluation on state-of-the-art models, Jano achieves substantial acceleration (average 2.0 times speedup, up to 2.4 times) while preserving generation quality. Our work challenges conventional uniform processing assumptions and provides a practical solution for accelerating large-scale content generation. The source code of our implementation is available at https://github.com/chen-yy20/Jano.

AI.tldr: Jano是一个无需训练的区域感知生成框架，通过早期复杂度识别算法和自适应token调度运行时，在扩散模型中实现显著加速（平均2.0倍，最高2.4倍），同时保持生成质量。
AI.motivation: 扩散模型在生成AI中取得了显著成功，但计算效率仍是重大挑战，特别是Diffusion Transformers需要密集的全注意力计算。现有加速方法主要关注内容无关的均匀优化策略，但作者观察到生成内容的不同区域在去噪过程中表现出异质的收敛模式。
AI.method: Jano引入早期阶段复杂度识别算法，在初始去噪步骤中准确识别区域收敛需求，并结合自适应token调度运行时来优化计算资源分配。这是一个无需训练的框架，利用区域异质性进行高效生成。
AI.result: 在先进模型上的综合评估显示，Jano实现了显著加速（平均2.0倍加速，最高2.4倍），同时保持了生成质量。该方法挑战了传统的均匀处理假设。
AI.conclusion: Jano通过利用区域异质收敛模式，为大规模内容生成提供了实用的加速解决方案，挑战了传统的均匀处理假设，并展示了训练free框架的有效性。

title: Bootstrapping Embeddings for Low Resource Languages
summary: Embedding models are crucial to modern NLP. However, the creation of the most effective models relies on carefully constructed supervised finetuning data. For high resource languages, such as English, such datasets are readily available. However, for hundreds of other languages, they are simply non-existent. We investigate whether the advent of large language models can help to bridge this gap. We test three different strategies for generating synthetic triplet data used to optimise embedding models. These include in-context learning as well as two novel approaches, leveraging adapter composition and cross lingual finetuning of the LLM generator (XL-LoRA) respectively. We find that while in-context learning still falls short of strong non-synthetic baselines, adapter composition and XL-LoRA yield strong performance gains across a wide array of tasks and languages, offering a clear, scalable pathway to producing performant embedding models for a wide variety of languages.

AI.tldr: 研究探索利用大语言模型生成合成三元组数据来优化低资源语言的嵌入模型，提出了两种新方法（适配器组合和XL-LoRA），在多种任务和语言上取得了显著性能提升。
AI.motivation: 当前嵌入模型的优化依赖于精心构建的监督微调数据，但这些数据仅在高资源语言（如英语）中可用，数百种其他语言缺乏此类数据集。研究旨在探索大语言模型是否能帮助弥合这一差距。
AI.method: 测试了三种生成合成三元组数据的策略：1）上下文学习；2）适配器组合（新方法）；3）跨语言微调LLM生成器（XL-LoRA，新方法）。这些方法用于优化嵌入模型。
AI.result: 上下文学习仍不及强非合成基线，但适配器组合和XL-LoRA在广泛的任务和语言上产生了显著的性能提升，为多种语言构建高性能嵌入模型提供了可扩展的途径。
AI.conclusion: 大语言模型能够有效生成低资源语言的合成训练数据，特别是通过适配器组合和XL-LoRA方法，为创建多种语言的高性能嵌入模型提供了清晰、可扩展的解决方案。

title: GAM-RAG: Gain-Adaptive Memory for Evolving Retrieval in Retrieval-Augmented Generation
summary: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) grounds large language models with external evidence, but many implementations rely on pre-built indices that remain static after construction. Related queries therefore repeat similar multi-hop traversal, increasing latency and compute. Motivated by schema-based learning in cognitive neuroscience, we propose GAM-RAG, a training-free framework that accumulates retrieval experience from recurring or related queries and updates retrieval memory over time. GAM-RAG builds a lightweight, relation-free hierarchical index whose links capture potential co-occurrence rather than fixed semantic relations. During inference, successful retrieval episodes provide sentence-level feedback, updating sentence memories so evidence useful for similar reasoning types becomes easier to activate later. To balance stability and adaptability under noisy feedback, we introduce an uncertainty-aware, Kalman-inspired gain rule that jointly updates memory states and perplexity-based uncertainty estimates. It applies fast updates for reliable novel signals and conservative refinement for stable or noisy memories. We provide a theoretical analysis of the update dynamics, and empirically show that GAM-RAG improves average performance by 3.95% over the strongest baseline and by 8.19% with 5-turn memory, while reducing inference cost by 61%. Our code and datasets are available at: https://anonymous.4open.science/r/GAM_RAG-2EF6.

AI.tldr: GAM-RAG 是一个无需训练的动态检索增强生成框架，通过积累检索经验构建轻量级层次索引，使用不确定性感知更新规则优化检索记忆，显著提升性能并降低推理成本。
AI.motivation: 传统RAG系统依赖静态索引，导致相关查询重复进行相似的多跳遍历，增加了延迟和计算成本。受认知神经科学中基于模式学习的启发，需要一种能够积累检索经验并动态更新检索记忆的方法。
AI.method: 提出GAM-RAG框架：1) 构建轻量级、无关系的层次索引，链接捕获潜在共现而非固定语义关系；2) 推理时通过句子级反馈更新句子记忆；3) 引入不确定性感知的卡尔曼启发增益规则，平衡稳定性和适应性，对可靠新信号快速更新，对稳定或噪声记忆保守优化。
AI.result: GAM-RAG比最强基线平均性能提升3.95%，在5轮记忆下提升8.19%，同时减少61%的推理成本。提供了更新动态的理论分析。
AI.conclusion: GAM-RAG通过动态积累检索经验和不确定性感知更新，有效解决了传统RAG静态索引的问题，在提升性能的同时显著降低了计算成本，为检索增强生成系统提供了更高效的解决方案。

title: Mesh-Pro: Asynchronous Advantage-guided Ranking Preference Optimization for Artist-style Quadrilateral Mesh Generation
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) has demonstrated remarkable success in text and image generation, yet its potential in 3D generation remains largely unexplored. Existing attempts typically rely on offline direct preference optimization (DPO) method, which suffers from low training efficiency and limited generalization. In this work, we aim to enhance both the training efficiency and generation quality of RL in 3D mesh generation. Specifically, (1) we design the first asynchronous online RL framework tailored for 3D mesh generation post-training efficiency improvement, which is 3.75$\times$ faster than synchronous RL. (2) We propose Advantage-guided Ranking Preference Optimization (ARPO), a novel RL algorithm that achieves a better trade-off between training efficiency and generalization than current RL algorithms designed for 3D mesh generation, such as DPO and group relative policy optimization (GRPO). (3) Based on asynchronous ARPO, we propose Mesh-Pro, which additionally introduces a novel diagonal-aware mixed triangular-quadrilateral tokenization for mesh representation and a ray-based reward for geometric integrity. Mesh-Pro achieves state-of-the-art performance on artistic and dense meshes.

AI.tldr: 提出Mesh-Pro：首个异步在线RL框架用于3D网格生成，通过ARPO算法、混合三角-四边形token化和射线奖励，实现训练效率3.75倍提升和SOTA生成质量。
AI.motivation: 现有RL在3D生成中主要使用离线DPO方法，存在训练效率低和泛化能力有限的问题。需要提升RL在3D网格生成中的训练效率和生成质量。
AI.method: 1) 设计首个异步在线RL框架用于3D网格生成后训练效率提升；2) 提出ARPO算法，平衡训练效率和泛化；3) Mesh-Pro引入对角线感知的混合三角-四边形token化表示和基于射线的几何完整性奖励。
AI.result: 异步RL比同步RL快3.75倍；ARPO在训练效率和泛化间取得更好平衡；Mesh-Pro在艺术和密集网格上达到最先进性能。
AI.conclusion: Mesh-Pro通过创新的异步RL框架、ARPO算法和网格表示方法，显著提升了3D网格生成的训练效率和生成质量，为RL在3D生成领域的应用开辟了新方向。

title: AnnoABSA: A Web-Based Annotation Tool for Aspect-Based Sentiment Analysis with Retrieval-Augmented Suggestions
comment: Accepted for publication at LREC 2026. Final version will appear in the ACL Anthology
summary: We introduce AnnoABSA, the first web-based annotation tool to support the full spectrum of Aspect-Based Sentiment Analysis (ABSA) tasks. The tool is highly customizable, enabling flexible configuration of sentiment elements and task-specific requirements. Alongside manual annotation, AnnoABSA provides optional Large Language Model (LLM)-based retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) suggestions that offer context-aware assistance in a human-in-the-loop approach, keeping the human annotator in control. To improve prediction quality over time, the system retrieves the ten most similar examples that are already annotated and adds them as few-shot examples in the prompt, ensuring that suggestions become increasingly accurate as the annotation process progresses. Released as open-source software under the MIT License, AnnoABSA is freely accessible and easily extendable for research and practical applications.

AI.tldr: AnnoABSA：首个支持完整ABSA任务的Web标注工具，具有高度可定制性，结合人工标注和LLM驱动的RAG建议，采用人机协同方式提高标注效率和质量。
AI.motivation: 目前缺乏支持完整Aspect-Based Sentiment Analysis（ABSA）任务的标注工具，需要开发一个灵活、可定制且能提高标注效率的工具，同时结合人工智能辅助来减轻人工负担。
AI.method: 开发基于Web的标注工具，支持ABSA全任务配置；采用检索增强生成（RAG）方法，通过LLM提供上下文感知建议；系统检索已标注的最相似10个示例作为few-shot提示，实现渐进式改进；采用人机协同（human-in-the-loop）方法，保持人工标注者的控制权。
AI.result: 成功开发并开源了AnnoABSA工具，支持完整的ABSA任务，具有高度可定制性；通过RAG和few-shot学习机制，随着标注进程推进，建议质量不断提高；工具以MIT许可证开源，便于研究和实际应用。
AI.conclusion: AnnoABSA是首个支持完整ABSA任务的Web标注工具，通过结合人工标注和LLM驱动的智能建议，有效提高了标注效率和质量，其开源特性将促进ABSA领域的研究和应用发展。

title: Incremental, inconsistency-resilient reasoning over Description Logic Abox streams
summary: More and more, data is being produced in a streaming fashion. This has led to increased interest into how actionable insights can be extracted in real time from data streams through Stream Reasoning. Reasoning over data streams raises multiple challenges, notably the high velocity of data, the real time requirement of the reasoning, and the noisy and volatile nature of streams. This paper proposes novel semantics for incremental reasoning over streams of Description Logic ABoxes, in order to tackle these challenges. To address the first two challenges, our semantics for reasoning over sliding windows on streams allow for incrementally computing the materialization of the window based on the materialization of the previous window. Furthermore, to deal with the volatile nature of streams, we present novel semantics for inconsistency repair on such windows, based on preferred repair semantics. We then detail our proposed semi-naive algorithms for incremental materialization maintenance in the case of OWL2 RL, both in the presence of inconsistencies and without.

AI.tldr: 提出针对数据流的增量推理语义，包括滑动窗口的增量物化计算和基于偏好修复的不一致性处理，适用于OWL2 RL流式推理
AI.motivation: 数据流处理面临高速度、实时性要求和流数据的噪声易变性等挑战，需要新的流式推理方法来实时提取可操作的洞察
AI.method: 提出流式描述逻辑ABox的增量推理语义：1) 滑动窗口的增量物化计算，基于前一窗口的物化结果；2) 基于偏好修复语义的不一致性修复方法；3) 针对OWL2 RL的半朴素增量物化维护算法
AI.result: 开发了能够处理流数据高速度、实时性要求和噪声易变性的增量推理框架，支持在存在不一致性和无不一致性情况下的高效流式推理
AI.conclusion: 提出的增量推理语义和算法有效解决了流式推理中的关键挑战，为实时数据流分析提供了可行的解决方案，特别适用于OWL2 RL流式推理场景

title: TP-Spikformer: Token Pruned Spiking Transformer
summary: Spiking neural networks (SNNs) offer an energy-efficient alternative to traditional neural networks due to their event-driven computing paradigm. However, recent advancements in spiking transformers have focused on improving accuracy with large-scale architectures, which require significant computational resources and limit deployment on resource-constrained devices. In this paper, we propose a simple yet effective token pruning method for spiking transformers, termed TP-Spikformer, that reduces storage and computational overhead while maintaining competitive performance. Specifically, we first introduce a heuristic spatiotemporal information-retaining criterion that comprehensively evaluates tokens' importance, assigning higher scores to informative tokens for retention and lower scores to uninformative ones for pruning. Based on this criterion, we propose an information-retaining token pruning framework that employs a block-level early stopping strategy for uninformative tokens, instead of removing them outright. This also helps preserve more information during token pruning. We demonstrate the effectiveness, efficiency and scalability of TP-Spikformer through extensive experiments across diverse architectures, including Spikformer, QKFormer and Spike-driven Transformer V1 and V3, and a range of tasks such as image classification, object detection, semantic segmentation and event-based object tracking. Particularly, TP-Spikformer performs well in a training-free manner. These results reveal its potential as an efficient and practical solution for deploying SNNs in real-world applications with limited computational resources.

AI.tldr: 提出TP-Spikformer，一种用于脉冲变压器的简单有效的令牌剪枝方法，通过保留时空信息准则和块级提前停止策略，在保持性能的同时减少计算和存储开销。
AI.motivation: 脉冲神经网络(SNNs)虽然具有能效优势，但当前脉冲变压器研究主要关注大规模架构的精度提升，这需要大量计算资源，限制了在资源受限设备上的部署。
AI.method: 提出启发式时空信息保留准则来评估令牌重要性，基于此构建信息保留令牌剪枝框架，采用块级提前停止策略处理非信息性令牌而非直接删除，以保留更多信息。
AI.result: TP-Spikformer在多种架构(Spikformer、QKFormer、Spike-driven Transformer V1/V3)和任务(图像分类、目标检测、语义分割、事件目标跟踪)上展现出有效性、效率和可扩展性，特别是在无训练方式下表现良好。
AI.conclusion: TP-Spikformer作为高效实用的解决方案，具有在计算资源有限的现实应用中部署SNNs的潜力。

title: Beyond the Resumé: A Rubric-Aware Automatic Interview System for Information Elicitation
summary: Effective hiring is integral to the success of an organisation, but it is very challenging to find the most suitable candidates because expert evaluation (e.g.\ interviews conducted by a technical manager) are expensive to deploy at scale. Therefore, automated resume scoring and other applicant-screening methods are increasingly used to coarsely filter candidates, making decisions on limited information. We propose that large language models (LLMs) can play the role of subject matter experts to cost-effectively elicit information from each candidate that is nuanced and role-specific, thereby improving the quality of early-stage hiring decisions. We present a system that leverages an LLM interviewer to update belief over an applicant's rubric-oriented latent traits in a calibrated way. We evaluate our system on simulated interviews and show that belief converges towards the simulated applicants' artificially-constructed latent ability levels. We release code, a modest dataset of public-domain/anonymised resumes, belief calibration tests, and simulated interviews, at \href{https://github.com/mbzuai-nlp/beyond-the-resume}{https://github.com/mbzuai-nlp/beyond-the-resume}. Our demo is available at \href{https://btr.hstu.net}{https://btr.hstu.net}.

AI.tldr: 使用大语言模型作为专家面试官，通过动态提问更新对候选人潜在能力的信念，提高招聘早期决策质量
AI.motivation: 传统招聘中专家评估成本高昂，自动化简历筛选信息有限。需要一种成本效益高且能获取角色特定细节信息的方法来改进早期招聘决策
AI.method: 设计一个系统，利用LLM面试官根据简历信息动态提问，通过贝叶斯更新校准地推断候选人在评分标准导向的潜在特质上的能力水平
AI.result: 在模拟面试中验证，系统对候选人潜在能力的信念能够收敛到模拟候选人的人工构建能力水平，证明了方法的有效性
AI.conclusion: LLM可以作为成本效益高的主题专家，通过动态信息收集改进招聘早期决策，为自动化招聘系统提供了新思路

title: What Papers Don't Tell You: Recovering Tacit Knowledge for Automated Paper Reproduction
comment: 32 pages (+ appendix), 8 figures. Lehui Li and Ruining Wang contributed equally. Yongshun Gong is the corresponding author
summary: Automated paper reproduction -- generating executable code from academic papers -- is bottlenecked not by information retrieval but by the tacit knowledge that papers inevitably leave implicit. We formalize this challenge as the progressive recovery of three types of tacit knowledge -- relational, somatic, and collective -- and propose \method, a graph-based agent framework with a dedicated mechanism for each: node-level relation-aware aggregation recovers relational knowledge by analyzing implementation-unit-level reuse and adaptation relationships between the target paper and its citation neighbors; execution-feedback refinement recovers somatic knowledge through iterative debugging driven by runtime signals; and graph-level knowledge induction distills collective knowledge from clusters of papers sharing similar implementations. On an extended ReproduceBench spanning 3 domains, 10 tasks, and 40 recent papers, \method{} achieves an average performance gap of 10.04\% against official implementations, improving over the strongest baseline by 24.68\%. The code will be publicly released upon acceptance; the repository link will be provided in the final version.

AI.tldr: 提出GraphAgent框架，通过恢复关系型、身体型和集体型三种隐性知识，实现从学术论文自动生成可执行代码，在ReproduceBench上性能提升显著。
AI.motivation: 自动化论文复现的主要瓶颈不是信息检索，而是论文中隐含的隐性知识。这些隐性知识包括关系型知识（实现单元间的重用和适配关系）、身体型知识（运行时调试经验）和集体型知识（相似实现论文集群中的共同模式）。
AI.method: 提出GraphAgent框架，包含三个专门机制：1）节点级关系感知聚合，通过分析目标论文与其引用邻居之间的实现单元级重用和适配关系来恢复关系型知识；2）执行反馈精炼，通过运行时信号驱动的迭代调试来恢复身体型知识；3）图级知识归纳，从共享相似实现的论文集群中提炼集体型知识。
AI.result: 在扩展的ReproduceBench（涵盖3个领域、10个任务、40篇近期论文）上，GraphAgent与官方实现的平均性能差距为10.04%，比最强基线提升了24.68%。
AI.conclusion: 通过形式化隐性知识恢复问题并设计专门的图基代理框架，显著提升了自动化论文复现的性能，证明了恢复关系型、身体型和集体型隐性知识的重要性。

title: CaptionFool: Universal Image Captioning Model Attacks
summary: Image captioning models are encoder-decoder architectures trained on large-scale image-text datasets, making them susceptible to adversarial attacks. We present CaptionFool, a novel universal (input-agnostic) adversarial attack against state-of-the-art transformer-based captioning models. By modifying only 7 out of 577 image patches (approximately 1.2% of the image), our attack achieves 94-96% success rate in generating arbitrary target captions, including offensive content. We further demonstrate that CaptionFool can generate "slang" terms specifically designed to evade existing content moderation filters. Our findings expose critical vulnerabilities in deployed vision-language models and underscore the urgent need for robust defenses against such attacks. Warning: This paper contains model outputs which are offensive in nature.

AI.tldr: CaptionFool是一种针对基于Transformer的图像描述模型的通用对抗攻击方法，仅修改图像中约1.2%的补丁就能实现94-96%的成功率，可生成任意目标描述（包括冒犯性内容）并规避内容审核过滤器。
AI.motivation: 图像描述模型基于大规模图像-文本数据集训练，容易受到对抗攻击。本文旨在揭示最先进的Transformer图像描述模型存在的安全漏洞，特别是能够生成任意目标描述（包括冒犯性内容）的通用对抗攻击。
AI.method: 提出CaptionFool攻击方法，这是一种输入无关的通用对抗攻击。通过仅修改图像中7个补丁（共577个，约1.2%），针对基于Transformer的图像描述模型进行攻击，能够生成任意目标描述，包括专门设计用于规避现有内容审核过滤器的"俚语"术语。
AI.result: 攻击成功率高达94-96%，能够成功生成任意目标描述，包括冒犯性内容。同时证明该方法可以生成专门规避内容审核过滤器的"俚语"术语，暴露了已部署视觉语言模型的严重安全漏洞。
AI.conclusion: CaptionFool攻击揭示了当前图像描述模型存在的严重安全漏洞，突显了开发针对此类攻击的鲁棒防御机制的紧迫性。警告：本文包含具有冒犯性的模型输出内容。

title: FreeAct: Freeing Activations for LLM Quantization
summary: Quantization is pivotal for mitigating the significant memory and computational overhead of Large Language Models (LLMs). While emerging transformation-based methods have successfully enhanced quantization by projecting feature spaces onto smoother manifolds using orthogonal matrices, they typically enforce a rigid one-to-one transformation constraint. This static approach fails to account for the dynamic patterns inherent in input activations, particularly within diffusion LLMs (dLLMs) and Multimodal LLMs (MLLMs), where varying token types exhibit distinct distributions. To advance this, we propose FreeAct, a novel quantization framework that relaxes the static one-to-one constraint to accommodate dynamic activation disparities. Theoretically, we leverage the rank-deficient nature of activations to derive a solution space that extends beyond simple inverse matrices, enabling the decoupling of activation transformations from weights. Methodologically, FreeAct identifies token-specific dynamics (i.e., vision v.s. text, or masked tokens) and allocates distinct transformation matrices to the activation side, while maintaining a unified, static transformation for the weights. Extensive experiments across dLLMs and MLLMs demonstrate that FreeAct significantly outperforms baselines, up to 5.3% performance improvement, with in-depth analyses. Our code will be publicly released.

AI.tldr: FreeAct提出了一种新颖的量化框架，通过放松静态的一对一变换约束来适应动态激活差异，在扩散LLMs和多模态LLMs上显著提升量化性能
AI.motivation: 现有基于变换的量化方法使用正交矩阵将特征空间投影到更平滑的流形上，但强制采用刚性的一对一变换约束。这种静态方法无法适应输入激活中的动态模式，特别是在扩散LLMs和多模态LLMs中，不同标记类型（如视觉vs文本）表现出不同的分布
AI.method: FreeAct利用激活的秩不足特性推导出超越简单逆矩阵的解空间，从而将激活变换与权重解耦。方法识别标记特定的动态特性（视觉vs文本或掩码标记），为激活侧分配不同的变换矩阵，同时为权重保持统一的静态变换
AI.result: 在扩散LLMs和多模态LLMs上的广泛实验表明，FreeAct显著优于基线方法，性能提升高达5.3%，并进行了深入分析
AI.conclusion: FreeAct通过放松静态一对一变换约束来适应动态激活差异，为LLM量化提供了更灵活的框架，特别是在处理具有不同标记类型的复杂模型时表现出色

title: Emerging Human-like Strategies for Semantic Memory Foraging in Large Language Models
summary: Both humans and Large Language Models (LLMs) store a vast repository of semantic memories. In humans, efficient and strategic access to this memory store is a critical foundation for a variety of cognitive functions. Such access has long been a focus of psychology and the computational mechanisms behind it are now well characterized. Much of this understanding has been gleaned from a widely-used neuropsychological and cognitive science assessment called the Semantic Fluency Task (SFT), which requires the generation of as many semantically constrained concepts as possible. Our goal is to apply mechanistic interpretability techniques to bring greater rigor to the study of semantic memory foraging in LLMs. To this end, we present preliminary results examining SFT as a case study. A central focus is on convergent and divergent patterns of generative memory search, which in humans play complementary strategic roles in efficient memory foraging. We show that these same behavioral signatures, critical to human performance on the SFT, also emerge as identifiable patterns in LLMs across distinct layers. Potentially, this analysis provides new insights into how LLMs may be adapted into closer cognitive alignment with humans, or alternatively, guided toward productive cognitive \emph{disalignment} to enhance complementary strengths in human-AI interaction.

AI.tldr: 论文将心理学中的语义流畅性任务应用于大语言模型，通过机制可解释性技术分析LLMs中的语义记忆搜索模式，发现其展现出与人类相似的收敛和发散搜索行为特征。
AI.motivation: 人类和LLMs都拥有庞大的语义记忆库，但人类的高效记忆访问机制已被心理学深入研究，而LLMs的语义记忆搜索机制尚不清楚。研究旨在将心理学中的语义流畅性任务应用于LLMs，通过机制可解释性技术更严谨地研究LLMs的语义记忆搜索模式。
AI.method: 采用语义流畅性任务作为案例研究，应用机制可解释性技术分析LLMs在不同层次中的语义记忆搜索模式，特别关注收敛和发散搜索模式这两种在人类认知中起互补作用的策略性行为特征。
AI.result: 研究发现LLMs在不同层次中展现出与人类相似的收敛和发散搜索行为特征，这些特征对人类在语义流畅性任务中的表现至关重要。这表明LLMs的语义记忆搜索机制与人类存在相似之处。
AI.conclusion: 该分析为理解LLMs如何实现与人类更紧密的认知对齐提供了新见解，同时也为引导LLMs与人类产生生产性的认知错位以增强人机交互的互补优势提供了可能方向。

title: RAFM: Retrieval-Augmented Flow Matching for Unpaired CBCT-to-CT Translation
summary: Cone-beam CT (CBCT) is routinely acquired in radiotherapy but suffers from severe artifacts and unreliable Hounsfield Unit (HU) values, limiting its direct use for dose calculation. Synthetic CT (sCT) generation from CBCT is therefore an important task, yet paired CBCT--CT data are often unavailable or unreliable due to temporal gaps, anatomical variation, and registration errors. In this work, we introduce rectified flow (RF) into unpaired CBCT-to-CT translation in medical imaging. Although RF is theoretically compatible with unpaired learning through distribution-level coupling and deterministic transport, its practical effectiveness under small medical datasets and limited batch sizes remains underexplored. Direct application with random or batch-local pseudo pairing can produce unstable supervision due to semantically mismatched endpoint samples. To address this challenge, we propose Retrieval-Augmented Flow Matching (RAFM), which adapts RF to the medical setting by constructing retrieval-guided pseudo pairs using a frozen DINOv3 encoder and a global CT memory bank. This strategy improves empirical coupling quality and stabilizes unpaired flow-based training. Experiments on SynthRAD2023 under a strict subject-level true-unpaired protocol show that RAFM outperforms existing methods across FID, MAE, SSIM, PSNR, and SegScore. The code is available at https://github.com/HiLab-git/RAFM.git.

AI.tldr: 提出RAFM方法，通过检索增强的流匹配改进无配对CBCT到CT的转换，解决医学图像中数据配对不可靠的问题
AI.motivation: CBCT在放疗中常规使用，但存在严重伪影和不可靠的HU值，无法直接用于剂量计算。虽然从CBCT生成合成CT很重要，但配对的CBCT-CT数据往往不可用或不可靠，存在时间间隔、解剖变异和配准误差等问题。
AI.method: 提出检索增强流匹配(RAFM)，将整流流(RF)引入医学图像的无配对CBCT-CT转换。使用冻结的DINOv3编码器和全局CT记忆库构建检索引导的伪配对，提高耦合质量并稳定基于流的无配对训练。
AI.result: 在SynthRAD2023数据集上，采用严格的主体级真无配对协议，RAFM在FID、MAE、SSIM、PSNR和SegScore等指标上优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: RAFM成功将整流流适应到医学设置，通过检索增强策略解决了小数据集和有限批次大小下的不稳定监督问题，为无配对CBCT到CT转换提供了有效解决方案。

title: LLM-as-an-Annotator: Training Lightweight Models with LLM-Annotated Examples for Aspect Sentiment Tuple Prediction
comment: Accepted for publication at LREC 2026. Final version will appear in the ACL Anthology
summary: Training models for Aspect-Based Sentiment Analysis (ABSA) tasks requires manually annotated data, which is expensive and time-consuming to obtain. This paper introduces LA-ABSA, a novel approach that leverages Large Language Model (LLM)-generated annotations to fine-tune lightweight models for complex ABSA tasks. We evaluate our approach on five datasets for Target Aspect Sentiment Detection (TASD) and Aspect Sentiment Quad Prediction (ASQP). Our approach outperformed previously reported augmentation strategies and achieved competitive performance with LLM-prompting in low-resource scenarios, while providing substantial energy efficiency benefits. For example, using 50 annotated examples for in-context learning (ICL) to guide the annotation of unlabeled data, LA-ABSA achieved an F1 score of 49.85 for ASQP on the SemEval Rest16 dataset, closely matching the performance of ICL prompting with Gemma-3-27B (51.10), while requiring significantly lower computational resources.

AI.tldr: LA-ABSA：利用LLM生成标注数据来微调轻量模型，用于方面情感分析任务，在低资源场景下性能接近LLM提示方法，但计算资源消耗显著降低。
AI.motivation: 方面情感分析任务需要大量人工标注数据，成本高且耗时。需要一种方法在低资源场景下获得良好性能，同时降低计算成本。
AI.method: 提出LA-ABSA方法：利用大语言模型生成标注数据，然后用这些数据微调轻量级模型。在TASD和ASQP任务上评估，使用少量标注样本进行上下文学习来指导未标注数据的标注。
AI.result: 在5个数据集上评估，LA-ABSA优于现有数据增强策略，在低资源场景下性能接近LLM提示方法（如SemEval Rest16数据集ASQP任务F1为49.85 vs Gemma-3-27B的51.10），同时计算资源消耗显著降低。
AI.conclusion: LA-ABSA提供了一种高效的方法，在低资源场景下实现接近LLM提示的性能，同时大幅降低计算成本和能耗，为方面情感分析任务提供了实用的解决方案。

title: CoVe: Training Interactive Tool-Use Agents via Constraint-Guided Verification
summary: Developing multi-turn interactive tool-use agents is challenging because real-world user needs are often complex and ambiguous, yet agents must execute deterministic actions to satisfy them. To address this gap, we introduce \textbf{CoVe} (\textbf{Co}nstraint-\textbf{Ve}rification), a post-training data synthesis framework designed for training interactive tool-use agents while ensuring both data complexity and correctness. CoVe begins by defining explicit task constraints, which serve a dual role: they guide the generation of complex trajectories and act as deterministic verifiers for assessing trajectory quality. This enables the creation of high-quality training trajectories for supervised fine-tuning (SFT) and the derivation of accurate reward signals for reinforcement learning (RL). Our evaluation on the challenging $τ^2$-bench benchmark demonstrates the effectiveness of the framework. Notably, our compact \textbf{CoVe-4B} model achieves success rates of 43.0\% and 59.4\% in the Airline and Retail domains, respectively; its overall performance significantly outperforms strong baselines of similar scale and remains competitive with models up to $17\times$ its size. These results indicate that CoVe provides an effective and efficient pathway for synthesizing training data for state-of-the-art interactive tool-use agents. To support future research, we open-source our code, trained model, and the full set of 12K high-quality trajectories used for training.

AI.tldr: CoVe是一个用于训练交互式工具使用代理的后训练数据合成框架，通过约束定义和验证确保数据复杂性和正确性，显著提升了小规模模型的性能。
AI.motivation: 现实世界中用户需求通常复杂且模糊，但代理必须执行确定性操作来满足这些需求，开发多轮交互式工具使用代理具有挑战性。
AI.method: CoVe框架首先定义明确的任务约束，这些约束既指导复杂轨迹的生成，又作为确定性验证器评估轨迹质量，从而为监督微调创建高质量训练轨迹，并为强化学习提供准确奖励信号。
AI.result: 在τ²-bench基准测试中，仅4B参数的CoVe-4B模型在航空和零售领域分别达到43.0%和59.4%的成功率，性能显著超越同规模基线，并与大17倍的模型保持竞争力。
AI.conclusion: CoVe为合成最先进交互式工具使用代理的训练数据提供了有效且高效的途径，作者开源了代码、训练模型和12K高质量训练轨迹以支持未来研究。

title: Adaptive Dynamic Dehazing via Instruction-Driven and Task-Feedback Closed-Loop Optimization for Diverse Downstream Task Adaptation
summary: In real-world vision systems,haze removal is required not only to enhance image visibility but also to meet the specific needs of diverse downstream tasks.To address this challenge,we propose a novel adaptive dynamic dehazing framework that incorporates a closed-loop optimization mechanism.It enables feedback-driven refinement based on downstream task performance and user instruction-guided adjustment during inference,allowing the model to satisfy the specific requirements of multiple downstream tasks without retraining.Technically,our framework integrates two complementary and innovative mechanisms: (1)a task feedback loop that dynamically modulates dehazing outputs based on performance across multiple downstream tasks,and (2) a text instruction interface that allows users to specify high-level task preferences.This dual-guidance strategy enables the model to adapt its dehazing behavior after training,tailoring outputs in real time to the evolving needs of multiple tasks.Extensive experiments across various vision tasks demonstrate the strong effectiveness,robustness,and generalizability of our approach.These results establish a new paradigm for interactive,task-adaptive dehazing that actively collaborates with downstream applications.

AI.tldr: 提出自适应动态去雾框架，结合闭环优化机制，通过下游任务反馈和用户文本指令调整去雾效果，无需重新训练即可满足多种下游任务需求。
AI.motivation: 现实视觉系统中，去雾不仅需要提升图像可见性，还要满足不同下游任务的特定需求。现有方法通常缺乏与下游任务的动态交互和用户指导调整能力。
AI.method: 提出自适应动态去雾框架，包含两个创新机制：1) 任务反馈循环，基于多个下游任务性能动态调整去雾输出；2) 文本指令接口，允许用户指定高级任务偏好。这种双重指导策略使模型在训练后能自适应调整去雾行为。
AI.result: 在各种视觉任务上的广泛实验表明，该方法具有强大的有效性、鲁棒性和泛化能力，为交互式、任务自适应的去雾建立了新范式。
AI.conclusion: 该研究建立了一种新的交互式、任务自适应去雾范式，能够主动与下游应用协作，实时适应多种任务的动态需求。

title: nchellwig at SemEval-2026 Task 3: Self-Consistent Structured Generation (SCSG) for Dimensional Aspect-Based Sentiment Analysis using Large Language Models
summary: We present Self-Consistent Structured Generation (SCSG) for Dimensional Aspect-Based Sentiment Analysis in SemEval-2026 Task 3 (Track A). SCSG enhances prediction reliability by executing a LoRA-adapted large language model multiple times per instance, retaining only tuples that achieve a majority consensus across runs. To mitigate the computational overhead of multiple forward passes, we leverage vLLM's PagedAttention mechanism for efficient key--value cache reuse. Evaluation across 6 languages and 8 language--domain combinations demonstrates that self-consistency with 15 executions yields statistically significant improvements over single-inference prompting, with our system (leveraging Gemma 3) ranking in the top seven across all settings, achieving second place on three out of four English subsets and first place on Tatar-Restaurant for DimASTE.

AI.tldr: 提出SCSG方法用于维度情感分析，通过多次执行LoRA适配的大语言模型并保留多数共识结果来提高预测可靠性，利用vLLM的PagedAttention减少计算开销，在6种语言8个领域组合中取得显著改进。
AI.motivation: 在维度情感分析任务中，提高预测的可靠性和一致性，同时解决多次前向传播带来的计算开销问题。
AI.method: 使用LoRA适配的大语言模型对每个实例执行多次推理，仅保留在多次运行中获得多数共识的结果元组，并利用vLLM的PagedAttention机制高效重用键值缓存以减少计算开销。
AI.result: 在6种语言8个语言-领域组合的评估中，15次执行的自一致性方法相比单次推理提示有统计显著改进，系统在所有设置中排名前七，在四个英语子集中的三个获得第二名，在Tatar-Restaurant的DimASTE中获得第一名。
AI.conclusion: SCSG方法通过自一致性机制有效提高了维度情感分析的预测可靠性，同时利用高效缓存技术缓解了计算开销，在SemEval-2026任务3中取得了优异的性能表现。

title: LiveCultureBench: a Multi-Agent, Multi-Cultural Benchmark for Large Language Models in Dynamic Social Simulations
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed as autonomous agents, yet evaluations focus primarily on task success rather than cultural appropriateness or evaluator reliability. We introduce LiveCultureBench, a multi-cultural, dynamic benchmark that embeds LLMs as agents in a simulated town and evaluates them on both task completion and adherence to socio-cultural norms. The simulation models a small city as a location graph with synthetic residents having diverse demographic and cultural profiles. Each episode assigns one resident a daily goal while others provide social context. An LLM-based verifier generates structured judgments on norm violations and task progress, which we aggregate into metrics capturing task-norm trade-offs and verifier uncertainty. Using LiveCultureBench across models and cultural profiles, we study (i) cross-cultural robustness of LLM agents, (ii) how they balance effectiveness against norm sensitivity, and (iii) when LLM-as-a-judge evaluation is reliable for automated benchmarking versus when human oversight is needed.

AI.tldr: LiveCultureBench：一个多文化动态基准测试，将LLM作为智能体嵌入模拟城镇，评估任务完成度和社会文化规范遵守情况
AI.motivation: 当前LLM作为自主智能体的评估主要关注任务成功，而忽略了文化适宜性和评估者可靠性。需要开发一个能够同时评估任务完成和文化规范遵守的基准测试系统。
AI.method: 构建模拟小镇作为位置图，包含具有多样化人口统计和文化背景的合成居民。每个情景中，一个居民有日常目标，其他居民提供社会背景。使用基于LLM的验证器生成关于规范违反和任务进展的结构化判断，并聚合成衡量任务-规范权衡和验证器不确定性的指标。
AI.result: 通过LiveCultureBench在不同模型和文化背景下进行研究，可以：(1) 评估LLM智能体的跨文化鲁棒性；(2) 分析它们在效果与规范敏感性之间的平衡；(3) 确定LLM作为评估者在自动基准测试中的可靠性程度，以及何时需要人工监督。
AI.conclusion: LiveCultureBench提供了一个综合评估框架，能够同时衡量LLM智能体的任务完成能力和文化规范遵守情况，有助于理解智能体在不同文化背景下的表现，并为自动化评估系统的可靠性提供指导。

title: Cross-Scale Pansharpening via ScaleFormer and the PanScale Benchmark
summary: Pansharpening aims to generate high-resolution multi-spectral images by fusing the spatial detail of panchromatic images with the spectral richness of low-resolution MS data. However, most existing methods are evaluated under limited, low-resolution settings, limiting their generalization to real-world, high-resolution scenarios. To bridge this gap, we systematically investigate the data, algorithmic, and computational challenges of cross-scale pansharpening. We first introduce PanScale, the first large-scale, cross-scale pansharpening dataset, accompanied by PanScale-Bench, a comprehensive benchmark for evaluating generalization across varying resolutions and scales. To realize scale generalization, we propose ScaleFormer, a novel architecture designed for multi-scale pansharpening. ScaleFormer reframes generalization across image resolutions as generalization across sequence lengths: it tokenizes images into patch sequences of the same resolution but variable length proportional to image scale. A Scale-Aware Patchify module enables training for such variations from fixed-size crops. ScaleFormer then decouples intra-patch spatial feature learning from inter-patch sequential dependency modeling, incorporating Rotary Positional Encoding to enhance extrapolation to unseen scales. Extensive experiments show that our approach outperforms SOTA methods in fusion quality and cross-scale generalization. The datasets and source code are available upon acceptance.

AI.tldr: 提出首个大规模跨尺度全色锐化数据集PanScale和基准测试，以及ScaleFormer架构，通过序列长度泛化解决跨分辨率泛化问题，在融合质量和跨尺度泛化方面优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有全色锐化方法主要在有限低分辨率设置下评估，难以泛化到真实世界高分辨率场景。需要系统研究跨尺度全色锐化的数据、算法和计算挑战。
AI.method: 1) 提出PanScale数据集和PanScale-Bench基准测试；2) 提出ScaleFormer架构，将图像分辨率泛化重构为序列长度泛化，使用Scale-Aware Patchify模块处理可变长度序列，分离空间特征学习和序列依赖建模，结合旋转位置编码增强未见尺度的外推能力。
AI.result: ScaleFormer在融合质量和跨尺度泛化方面优于现有最先进方法。提供了大规模数据集和基准测试，支持跨分辨率评估。
AI.conclusion: 通过将分辨率泛化重构为序列长度泛化，ScaleFormer有效解决了跨尺度全色锐化问题，为真实世界高分辨率应用提供了更好的解决方案。

title: Semantic Novelty Trajectories in 80,000 Books: A Cross-Corpus Embedding Analysis
summary: I apply Schmidhuber's compression progress theory of interestingness at corpus scale, analyzing semantic novelty trajectories in more than 80,000 books spanning two centuries of English-language publishing. Using sentence-transformer paragraph embeddings and a running-centroid novelty measure, I compare 28,730 pre-1920 Project Gutenberg books (PG19) against 52,796 modern English books (Books3, approximately 1990-2010). The principal findings are fourfold. First, mean paragraph-level novelty is roughly 10% higher in modern books (0.503 vs. 0.459). Second, trajectory circuitousness -- the ratio of cumulative path length to net displacement in embedding space -- nearly doubles in the modern corpus (+67%). Third, convergent narrative curves, in which novelty declines toward a settled semantic register, are 2.3x more common in pre-1920 literature. Fourth, novelty is orthogonal to reader quality ratings (r = -0.002), suggesting that interestingness in Schmidhuber's sense is structurally independent of perceived literary merit. Clustering paragraph-level trajectories via PAA-16 representations reveals eight distinct narrative-shape archetypes whose distribution shifts substantially between eras. All analysis code and an interactive exploration toolkit are publicly available at https://bigfivekiller.online/novelty_hub.

AI.tldr: 应用Schmidhuber的压缩进展理论，分析8万多本英文书籍的语义新颖性轨迹，发现现代书籍比19世纪书籍新颖性更高、轨迹更曲折，但新颖性与读者评分无关
AI.motivation: 研究文学作品中语义新颖性的历史演变，验证Schmidhuber的压缩进展理论在语料库尺度上的应用，探索不同时代文学作品的叙事结构差异
AI.method: 使用句子转换器生成段落嵌入，采用运行质心新颖性度量，比较28,730本1920年前的Project Gutenberg书籍和52,796本现代英文书籍，通过PAA-16表示聚类段落级轨迹
AI.result: 1) 现代书籍段落级新颖性平均高10%；2) 现代语料库轨迹曲折度增加67%；3) 收敛叙事曲线在1920年前文学中更常见(2.3倍)；4) 新颖性与读者质量评分无关(r=-0.002)；发现8种叙事形态原型
AI.conclusion: Schmidhuber意义上的"有趣性"与感知的文学价值结构独立，不同时代文学作品在叙事结构上存在系统性差异，现代文学更倾向于复杂曲折的语义轨迹

title: According to Me: Long-Term Personalized Referential Memory QA
summary: Personalized AI assistants must recall and reason over long-term user memory, which naturally spans multiple modalities and sources such as images, videos, and emails. However, existing Long-term Memory benchmarks focus primarily on dialogue history, failing to capture realistic personalized references grounded in lived experience. We introduce ATM-Bench, the first benchmark for multimodal, multi-source personalized referential Memory QA. ATM-Bench contains approximately four years of privacy-preserving personal memory data and human-annotated question-answer pairs with ground-truth memory evidence, including queries that require resolving personal references, multi-evidence reasoning from multi-source and handling conflicting evidence. We propose Schema-Guided Memory (SGM) to structurally represent memory items originated from different sources. In experiments, we implement 5 state-of-the-art memory systems along with a standard RAG baseline and evaluate variants with different memory ingestion, retrieval, and answer generation techniques. We find poor performance (under 20\% accuracy) on the ATM-Bench-Hard set, and that SGM improves performance over Descriptive Memory commonly adopted in prior works. Code available at: https://github.com/JingbiaoMei/ATM-Bench

AI.tldr: ATM-Bench是首个多模态、多源个性化参考记忆问答基准，包含约4年隐私保护的个人记忆数据和人工标注的QA对，旨在评估AI助手对长期用户记忆的回忆和推理能力。
AI.motivation: 现有长期记忆基准主要关注对话历史，未能捕捉基于真实生活经验的个性化参考。个性化AI助手需要回忆和推理跨越多模态（图像、视频、邮件等）和多来源的长期用户记忆。
AI.method: 提出Schema-Guided Memory (SGM)来结构化表示不同来源的记忆项。实现5种最先进的记忆系统以及标准RAG基线，评估不同记忆摄取、检索和答案生成技术的变体。
AI.result: 在ATM-Bench-Hard集上表现不佳（准确率低于20%），SGM相比先前工作中常用的描述性记忆能提高性能。
AI.conclusion: ATM-Bench填补了多模态、多源个性化参考记忆评估的空白，SGM方法在结构化记忆表示方面显示出优势，但当前系统在复杂个性化记忆推理任务上仍有很大改进空间。

title: Multiple Inputs and Mixwd data for Alzheimer's Disease Classification Based on 3D Vision Transformer
summary: The current methods for diagnosing Alzheimer Disease using Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI) have significant limitations. Many previous studies used 2D Transformers to analyze individual brain slices independently, potentially losing critical 3D contextual information. Region of interest-based models often focus on only a few brain regions despite Alzheimer's affecting multiple areas. Additionally, most classification models rely on a single test, whereas diagnosing Alzheimer's requires a multifaceted approach integrating diverse data sources for a more accurate assessment. This study introduces a novel methodology called the Multiple Inputs and Mixed Data 3D Vision Transformer (MIMD-3DVT). This method processes consecutive slices together to capture the feature dimensions and spatial information, fuses multiple 3D ROI imaging data inputs, and integrates mixed data from demographic factors, cognitive assessments, and brain imaging. The proposed methodology was experimentally evaluated using a combined dataset that included the Alzheimer's Disease Neuroimaging Initiative (ADNI), the Australian Imaging, Biomarker, and Lifestyle Flagship Study of Ageing (AIBL), and the Open Access Series of Imaging Studies (OASIS). Our MIMD-3DVT, utilizing single or multiple ROIs, achieved an accuracy of 97.14%, outperforming the state-of-the-art methods in distinguishing between Normal Cognition and Alzheimer's Disease.

AI.tldr: 提出MIMD-3DVT方法，通过处理连续脑切片、融合多个3D ROI成像数据，并整合人口统计、认知评估和脑成像等多源数据，在阿尔茨海默病诊断中达到97.14%的准确率，优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 当前基于MRI的阿尔茨海默病诊断方法存在局限性：1）2D Transformer独立分析单个脑切片，可能丢失关键的3D上下文信息；2）基于感兴趣区域的方法通常只关注少数脑区，而阿尔茨海默病影响多个脑区；3）大多数分类模型依赖单一测试，而阿尔茨海默病诊断需要整合多种数据源的多方面方法。
AI.method: 提出MIMD-3DVT（多输入混合数据3D视觉Transformer）方法：1）处理连续切片以捕捉特征维度和空间信息；2）融合多个3D ROI成像数据输入；3）整合人口统计因素、认知评估和脑成像等混合数据。使用ADNI、AIBL和OASIS组合数据集进行实验评估。
AI.result: MIMD-3DVT方法在区分正常认知和阿尔茨海默病方面达到97.14%的准确率，优于现有最先进方法。无论是使用单个还是多个ROI，该方法都表现出优越性能。
AI.conclusion: MIMD-3DVT通过整合3D空间信息、多个脑区特征以及多源数据，显著提高了阿尔茨海默病的诊断准确性，为临床诊断提供了更可靠的辅助工具。

title: ALTER: Asymmetric LoRA for Token-Entropy-Guided Unlearning of LLMs
comment: Accepted at The 40th Annual AAAI Conference on Artificial Intelligence (AAAI 2026)
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have advanced to encompass extensive knowledge across diverse domains. Yet controlling what a LLMs should not know is important for ensuring alignment and thus safe use. However, effective unlearning in LLMs is difficult due to the fuzzy boundary between knowledge retention and forgetting. This challenge is exacerbated by entangled parameter spaces from continuous multi-domain training, often resulting in collateral damage, especially under aggressive unlearning strategies. Furthermore, the computational overhead required to optimize State-of-the-Art (SOTA) models with billions of parameters poses an additional barrier. In this work, we present ALTER, a lightweight unlearning framework for LLMs to address both the challenges of knowledge entanglement and unlearning efficiency. ALTER operates through two phases: (I) high entropy tokens are captured and learned via the shared A matrix in LoRA, followed by (II) an asymmetric LoRA architecture that achieves a specified forgetting objective by parameter isolation and unlearning tokens within the target subdomains. Serving as a new research direction for achieving unlearning via token-level isolation in the asymmetric framework. ALTER achieves SOTA performance on TOFU, WMDP, and MUSE benchmarks with over 95% forget quality and shows minimal side effects through preserving foundational tokens. By decoupling unlearning from LLMs' billion-scale parameters, this framework delivers excellent efficiency while preserving over 90% of model utility, exceeding baseline preservation rates of 47.8-83.6%.

AI.tldr: ALTER是一个轻量化的LLM遗忘框架，通过两阶段LoRA架构实现高效遗忘，在保持模型效用的同时达到95%以上的遗忘质量。
AI.motivation: 控制LLM不应该知道什么对于确保对齐和安全使用很重要，但LLM中的有效遗忘很困难，因为知识保留和遗忘之间的边界模糊，加上多领域训练导致的参数空间纠缠，以及数十亿参数模型的计算开销问题。
AI.method: ALTER采用两阶段LoRA架构：第一阶段通过共享的A矩阵捕获和学习高熵token；第二阶段使用非对称LoRA架构，通过参数隔离和遗忘目标子域内的token来实现特定遗忘目标。
AI.result: ALTER在TOFU、WMDP和MUSE基准测试中达到SOTA性能，遗忘质量超过95%，同时通过保留基础token最小化副作用。在保持超过90%模型效用的同时，效率优异，超过基线保留率47.8-83.6%。
AI.conclusion: ALTER通过token级隔离的非对称框架为LLM遗忘提供了新的研究方向，通过将遗忘与LLM的数十亿参数解耦，实现了优异的效率和效用保持。

title: Rich Insights from Cheap Signals: Efficient Evaluations via Tensor Factorization
summary: Moving beyond evaluations that collapse performance across heterogeneous prompts toward fine-grained evaluation at the prompt level, or within relatively homogeneous subsets, is necessary to diagnose generative models' strengths and weaknesses. Such fine-grained evaluations, however, suffer from a data bottleneck: human gold-standard labels are too costly at this scale, while automated ratings are often misaligned with human judgment. To resolve this challenge, we propose a novel statistical model based on tensor factorization that merges cheap autorater data with a limited set of human gold-standard labels. Specifically, our approach uses autorater scores to pretrain latent representations of prompts and generative models, and then aligns those pretrained representations to human preferences using a small calibration set. This sample-efficient methodology is robust to autorater quality, more accurately predicts human preferences on a per-prompt basis than standard baselines, and provides tight confidence intervals for key statistical parameters of interest. We also showcase the practical utility of our method by constructing granular leaderboards based on prompt qualities and by estimating model performance solely from autorater scores, eliminating the need for additional human annotations.

AI.tldr: 提出基于张量分解的统计模型，结合自动评分和少量人工标注，实现细粒度评估生成模型性能
AI.motivation: 现有评估方法存在数据瓶颈：细粒度评估需要大量人工标注成本过高，而自动评分与人类判断不一致
AI.method: 使用张量分解模型，用自动评分预训练提示和生成模型的潜在表示，再用少量校准集将这些表示与人类偏好对齐
AI.result: 方法对自动评分质量具有鲁棒性，比基线更准确预测每提示的人类偏好，提供关键统计参数的紧密置信区间
AI.conclusion: 该方法能构建基于提示质量的细粒度排行榜，仅从自动评分估计模型性能，无需额外人工标注

title: Weakly Supervised Video Anomaly Detection with Anomaly-Connected Components and Intention Reasoning
summary: Weakly supervised video anomaly detection (WS-VAD) involves identifying the temporal intervals that contain anomalous events in untrimmed videos, where only video-level annotations are provided as supervisory signals. However, a key limitation persists in WS-VAD, as dense frame-level annotations are absent, which often leaves existing methods struggling to learn anomaly semantics effectively. To address this issue, we propose a novel framework named LAS-VAD, short for Learning Anomaly Semantics for WS-VAD, which integrates anomaly-connected component mechanism and intention awareness mechanism. The former is designed to assign video frames into distinct semantic groups within a video, and frame segments within the same group are deemed to share identical semantic information. The latter leverages an intention-aware strategy to distinguish between similar normal and abnormal behaviors (e.g., taking items and stealing). To further model the semantic information of anomalies, as anomaly occurrence is accompanied by distinct characteristic attributes (i.e., explosions are characterized by flames and thick smoke), we additionally incorporate anomaly attribute information to guide accurate detection. Extensive experiments on two benchmark datasets, XD-Violence and UCF-Crime, demonstrate that our LAS-VAD outperforms current state-of-the-art methods with remarkable gains.

AI.tldr: LAS-VAD：一种用于弱监督视频异常检测的新框架，通过异常连接组件机制和意图感知机制来学习异常语义，在XD-Violence和UCF-Crime数据集上优于现有方法。
