(3) To resolve structural ambiguity, we leverage Nano Banana Pro, Google's reasoning-guided AI image generation model, to guide a causal prior, effectively pulling content representations back onto the natural-image manifold. Extensive experiments demonstrate that TCD-Net outperforms mainstream methods across multiple benchmarks in both fidelity and efficiency, achieving a real-time speed of 104.2 FPS on a single RTX 5090 GPU.

AI.tldr: TCD-Net通过因果干预和特征解缠实现图像去噪，解决传统方法中环境因素与噪声模式虚假相关的问题，在保真度和效率上超越主流方法。
AI.motivation: 传统图像去噪模型容易学习环境因素与噪声模式之间的虚假相关性，且由于高频模糊性难以可靠区分细微纹理与随机噪声，导致细节过度去除或残留噪声伪影。纯相关性拟合会混淆内在内容与外在噪声，直接降低分布偏移下的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 提出教师引导的因果解缠网络(TCD-Net)，在Vision Transformer框架内通过特征空间的结构化干预显式分解生成机制。包含三个关键组件：1)环境偏置调整模块将特征投影到稳定去中心化子空间以抑制全局环境偏置；2)双分支解缠头采用正交约束强制分离内容与噪声表示；3)利用Nano Banana Pro推理引导AI图像生成模型引导因果先验，将内容表示拉回自然图像流形。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中，TCD-Net在保真度和效率上均优于主流方法，在单张RTX 5090 GPU上实现104.2 FPS的实时速度。
AI.conclusion: 通过因果干预和特征解缠的方法能有效解决传统去噪模型中的虚假相关性问题，显著提升去噪性能和对分布偏移的鲁棒性，同时保持高效率。

title: ArtLLM: Generating Articulated Assets via 3D LLM
summary: Creating interactive digital environments for gaming, robotics, and simulation relies on articulated 3D objects whose functionality emerges from their part geometry and kinematic structure. However, existing approaches remain fundamentally limited: optimization-based reconstruction methods require slow, per-object joint fitting and typically handle only simple, single-joint objects, while retrieval-based methods assemble parts from a fixed library, leading to repetitive geometry and poor generalization. To address these challenges, we introduce ArtLLM, a novel framework for generating high-quality articulated assets directly from complete 3D meshes. At its core is a 3D multimodal large language model trained on a large-scale articulation dataset curated from both existing articulation datasets and procedurally generated objects. Unlike prior work, ArtLLM autoregressively predicts a variable number of parts and joints, inferring their kinematic structure in a unified manner from the object's point cloud. This articulation-aware layout then conditions a 3D generative model to synthesize high-fidelity part geometries. Experiments on the PartNet-Mobility dataset show that ArtLLM significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods in both part layout accuracy and joint prediction, while generalizing robustly to real-world objects. Finally, we demonstrate its utility in constructing digital twins, highlighting its potential for scalable robot learning.

AI.tldr: ArtLLM：基于3D多模态大语言模型的关节化3D资产生成框架，能够从完整3D网格直接生成高质量关节化资产，显著优于现有方法
AI.motivation: 现有方法存在根本性限制：基于优化的重建方法需要缓慢的逐对象关节拟合且只能处理简单单关节对象；基于检索的方法从固定库中组装部件，导致几何重复且泛化能力差
AI.method: 提出ArtLLM框架，核心是3D多模态大语言模型，在大规模关节数据集上训练，能够自回归预测可变数量的部件和关节，从点云统一推断运动学结构，然后通过3D生成模型合成高保真部件几何
AI.result: 在PartNet-Mobility数据集上，ArtLLM在部件布局准确性和关节预测方面显著优于最先进方法，并能鲁棒地泛化到真实世界对象
AI.conclusion: ArtLLM展示了构建数字孪生的实用性，突出了其在可扩展机器人学习方面的潜力

title: Multi-Level Bidirectional Decoder Interaction for Uncertainty-Aware Breast Ultrasound Analysis
comment: 10 pages, 3 figures, 2 tables. The code is available at: https://github.com/C-loud-Nine/Uncertainty-Aware-Multi-Level-Decoder-Interaction
summary: Breast ultrasound interpretation requires simultaneous lesion segmentation and tissue classification. However, conventional multi-task learning approaches suffer from task interference and rigid coordination strategies that fail to adapt to instance-specific prediction difficulty. We propose a multi-task framework addressing these limitations through multi-level decoder interaction and uncertainty-aware adaptive coordination. Task Interaction Modules operate at all decoder levels, establishing bidirectional segmentation-classification communication during spatial reconstruction through attention weighted pooling and multiplicative modulation. Unlike prior single-level or encoder-only approaches, this multi-level design captures scale specific task synergies across semantic-to-spatial scales, producing complementary task interaction streams. Uncertainty-Proxy Attention adaptively weights base versus enhanced features at each level using feature activation variance, enabling per-level and per-sample task balancing without heuristic tuning. To support instance-adaptive prediction, multi-scale context fusion captures morphological cues across varying lesion sizes. Evaluation on multiple publicly available breast ultrasound datasets demonstrates competitive performance, including 74.5% lesion IoU and 90.6% classification accuracy on BUSI dataset. Ablation studies confirm that multi-level task interaction provides significant performance gains, validating that decoder-level bidirectional communication is more effective than conventional encoder-only parameter sharing. The code is available at: https://github.com/C-loud-Nine/Uncertainty-Aware-Multi-Level-Decoder-Interaction.

AI.tldr: 提出一种用于乳腺超声图像分析的多任务框架，通过多层次解码器交互和不确定性感知的自适应协调，同时进行病灶分割和组织分类，解决了传统多任务学习中任务干扰和协调策略僵化的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统乳腺超声图像分析的多任务学习方法存在任务干扰问题，且协调策略僵化，无法适应不同样本的预测难度差异。需要一种能够自适应协调分割和分类任务，并充分利用任务间协同作用的框架。
AI.method: 1. 多层次解码器交互：在所有解码器层级引入任务交互模块，通过注意力加权池化和乘法调制实现分割与分类的双向通信；2. 不确定性代理注意力：利用特征激活方差自适应加权基础特征与增强特征，实现层级和样本级的任务平衡；3. 多尺度上下文融合：捕捉不同大小病灶的形态学线索，支持实例自适应预测。
AI.result: 在多个公开乳腺超声数据集上取得竞争性性能，在BUSI数据集上达到74.5%的病灶IoU和90.6%的分类准确率。消融实验证实多层次任务交互带来显著性能提升，验证了解码器级双向通信比传统仅编码器参数共享更有效。
AI.conclusion: 提出的不确定性感知多层次解码器交互框架通过自适应任务协调和跨尺度任务协同，有效解决了乳腺超声图像分析中的多任务学习挑战，在分割和分类任务上均取得优异性能。

title: ConVibNet: Needle Detection during Continuous Insertion via Frequency-Inspired Features
summary:
Purpose: Ultrasound-guided needle interventions are widely used in clinical practice, but their success critically depends on accurate needle placement, which is frequently hindered by the poor and intermittent visibility of needles in ultrasound images. Existing approaches remain limited by artifacts, occlusions, and low contrast, and often fail to support real-time continuous insertion. To overcome these challenges, this study introduces a robust real-time framework for continuous needle detection.
  Methods: We present ConVibNet, an extension of VibNet for detecting needles with significantly reduced visibility, addressing real-time, continuous needle tracking during insertion. ConVibNet leverages temporal dependencies across successive ultrasound frames to enable continuous estimation of both needle tip position and shaft angle in dynamic scenarios. To strengthen temporal awareness of needle-tip motion, we introduce a novel intersection-and-difference loss that explicitly leverages motion correlations across consecutive frames. In addition, we curated a dedicated dataset for model development and evaluation.
  Results: The performance of the proposed ConVibNet model was evaluated on our dataset, demonstrating superior accuracy compared to the baseline VibNet and UNet-LSTM models. Specifically, ConVibNet achieved a tip error of 2.80+-2.42 mm and an angle error of 1.69+-2.00 deg. These results represent a 0.75 mm improvement in tip localization accuracy over the best-performing baseline, while preserving real-time inference capability.
  Conclusion: ConVibNet advances real-time needle detection in ultrasound-guided interventions by integrating temporal correlation modeling with a novel intersection-and-difference loss, thereby improving accuracy and robustness and demonstrating high potential for integration into autonomous insertion systems.

AI.tldr: ConVibNet：一种用于超声引导针干预的实时连续针检测框架，通过时间相关性建模和新型损失函数提高针尖定位精度。
AI.motivation: 超声引导针干预中，针在超声图像中的可视性差且不连续，现有方法受伪影、遮挡和低对比度限制，难以支持实时连续插入。
AI.method: 提出ConVibNet，扩展VibNet以检测可视性显著降低的针，利用连续超声帧的时间依赖性实现针尖位置和针轴角度的连续估计，引入新型交叉差分损失函数增强针尖运动的时间感知。
AI.result: 在专用数据集上评估，ConVibNet优于基线VibNet和UNet-LSTM，针尖误差2.80±2.42mm，角度误差1.69±2.00度，针尖定位精度比最佳基线提高0.75mm，同时保持实时推理能力。
AI.conclusion: ConVibNet通过整合时间相关性建模和新型交叉差分损失，推进了超声引导干预中的实时针检测，提高了准确性和鲁棒性，展示了集成到自主插入系统中的高潜力。

title: AG-VAS: Anchor-Guided Zero-Shot Visual Anomaly Segmentation with Large Multimodal Models
summary: Large multimodal models (LMMs) exhibit strong task generalization capabilities, offering new opportunities for zero-shot visual anomaly segmentation (ZSAS). However, existing LMM-based segmentation approaches still face fundamental limitations: anomaly concepts are inherently abstract and context-dependent, lacking stable visual prototypes, and the weak alignment between high-level semantic embeddings and pixel-level spatial features hinders precise anomaly localization. To address these challenges, we present AG-VAS (Anchor-Guided Visual Anomaly Segmentation), a new framework that expands the LMM vocabulary with three learnable semantic anchor tokens-[SEG], [NOR], and [ANO], establishing a unified anchor-guided segmentation paradigm. Specifically, [SEG] serves as an absolute semantic anchor that translates abstract anomaly semantics into explicit, spatially grounded visual entities (e.g., holes or scratches), while [NOR] and [ANO] act as relative anchors that model the contextual contrast between normal and abnormal patterns across categories. To further enhance cross-modal alignment, we introduce a Semantic-Pixel Alignment Module (SPAM) that aligns language-level semantic embeddings with high-resolution visual features, along with an Anchor-Guided Mask Decoder (AGMD) that performs anchor-conditioned mask prediction for precise anomaly localization. In addition, we curate Anomaly-Instruct20K, a large-scale instruction dataset that organizes anomaly knowledge into structured descriptions of appearance, shape, and spatial attributes, facilitating effective learning and integration of the proposed semantic anchors. Extensive experiments on six industrial and medical benchmarks demonstrate that AG-VAS achieves consistent state-of-the-art performance in the zero-shot setting.

AI.tldr: AG-VAS提出了一种基于可学习语义锚点令牌的零样本视觉异常分割框架，通过[SEG]、[NOR]、[ANO]三个锚点建立统一的分割范式，结合语义-像素对齐模块和锚点引导掩码解码器，在多个工业与医学基准上取得SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有大型多模态模型在零样本视觉异常分割中存在两个根本限制：1）异常概念抽象且依赖上下文，缺乏稳定的视觉原型；2）高层语义嵌入与像素级空间特征对齐弱，导致异常定位不精确。
AI.method: 1）引入三个可学习语义锚点令牌：[SEG]作为绝对语义锚点将抽象异常语义转化为显式空间实体，[NOR]和[ANO]作为相对锚点建模正常与异常模式的上下文对比；2）提出语义-像素对齐模块（SPAM）对齐语言级语义嵌入与高分辨率视觉特征；3）设计锚点引导掩码解码器（AGMD）进行锚点条件掩码预测；4）构建Anomaly-Instruct20K大规模指令数据集，结构化组织异常知识。
AI.result: 在六个工业和医学基准测试上的广泛实验表明，AG-VAS在零样本设置下实现了持续的最先进性能。
AI.conclusion: AG-VAS通过引入语义锚点令牌和增强跨模态对齐，有效解决了LMM在异常分割中的抽象语义表示和精确定位问题，为零样本视觉异常分割提供了新的解决方案。

title: You Only Need One Stage: Novel-View Synthesis From A Single Blind Face Image
summary: We propose a novel one-stage method, NVB-Face, for generating consistent Novel-View images directly from a single Blind Face image. Existing approaches to novel-view synthesis for objects or faces typically require a high-resolution RGB image as input. When dealing with degraded images, the conventional pipeline follows a two-stage process: first restoring the image to high resolution, then synthesizing novel views from the restored result. However, this approach is highly dependent on the quality of the restored image, often leading to inaccuracies and inconsistencies in the final output. To address this limitation, we extract single-view features directly from the blind face image and introduce a feature manipulator that transforms these features into 3D-aware, multi-view latent representations. Leveraging the powerful generative capacity of a diffusion model, our framework synthesizes high-quality, consistent novel-view face images. Experimental results show that our method significantly outperforms traditional two-stage approaches in both consistency and fidelity.

AI.tldr: 提出NVB-Face方法，直接从单张盲脸图像生成一致的新视角图像，避免传统两阶段方法对图像恢复质量的依赖
AI.motivation: 现有新视角合成方法通常需要高分辨率RGB图像作为输入，对于退化图像需要先恢复再合成，这种方法高度依赖恢复图像质量，容易导致最终输出不准确和不一致
AI.method: 直接从盲脸图像提取单视角特征，引入特征操纵器将这些特征转换为3D感知的多视角潜在表示，利用扩散模型的强大生成能力合成高质量、一致的新视角人脸图像
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该方法在一致性和保真度方面显著优于传统的两阶段方法
AI.conclusion: NVB-Face提供了一种直接从退化图像生成一致新视角图像的有效单阶段方法，克服了传统两阶段方法的局限性

title: BeautyGRPO: Aesthetic Alignment for Face Retouching via Dynamic Path Guidance and Fine-Grained Preference Modeling
summary: Face retouching requires removing subtle imperfections while preserving unique facial identity features, in order to enhance overall aesthetic appeal. However, existing methods suffer from a fundamental trade-off. Supervised learning on labeled data is constrained to pixel-level label mimicry, failing to capture complex subjective human aesthetic preferences. Conversely, while online reinforcement learning (RL) excels at preference alignment, its stochastic exploration paradigm conflicts with the high-fidelity demands of face retouching and often introduces noticeable noise artifacts due to accumulated stochastic drift. To address these limitations, we propose BeautyGRPO, a reinforcement learning framework that aligns face retouching with human aesthetic preferences. We construct FRPref-10K, a fine-grained preference dataset covering five key retouching dimensions, and train a specialized reward model capable of evaluating subtle perceptual differences. To reconcile exploration and fidelity, we introduce Dynamic Path Guidance (DPG). DPG stabilizes the stochastic sampling trajectory by dynamically computing an anchor-based ODE path and replanning a guided trajectory at each sampling timestep, effectively correcting stochastic drift while maintaining controlled exploration. Extensive experiments show that BeautyGRPO outperforms both specialized face retouching methods and general image editing models, achieving superior texture quality, more accurate blemish removal, and overall results that better align with human aesthetic preferences.

AI.tldr: BeautyGRPO是一个基于强化学习的人脸美化框架，通过动态路径引导解决传统方法在探索与保真度之间的权衡问题，更好地对齐人类审美偏好。
AI.motivation: 现有的人脸美化方法存在根本性权衡：监督学习方法受限于像素级标签模仿，无法捕捉复杂的主观审美偏好；而在线强化学习虽然擅长偏好对齐，但其随机探索范式与高保真度需求冲突，容易引入噪声伪影。
AI.method: 1) 构建FRPref-10K细粒度偏好数据集，涵盖五个关键美化维度；2) 训练专门的奖励模型来评估细微感知差异；3) 提出动态路径引导(DPG)，通过动态计算基于锚点的ODE路径并在每个采样时间步重新规划引导轨迹，稳定随机采样轨迹，纠正随机漂移同时保持受控探索。
AI.result: BeautyGRPO在广泛实验中优于专门的人脸美化方法和通用图像编辑模型，实现了更优的纹理质量、更准确的瑕疵去除，以及更符合人类审美偏好的整体结果。
AI.conclusion: BeautyGRPO通过动态路径引导成功解决了人脸美化中探索与保真度的权衡问题，实现了与人类审美偏好的更好对齐，为人脸美化任务提供了一种有效的强化学习框架。

title: FREE-Edit: Using Editing-aware Injection in Rectified Flow Models for Zero-shot Image-Driven Video Editing
summary: Image-driven video editing aims to propagate edit contents from the modified first frame to the rest frames. The existing methods usually invert the source video to noise using a pre-trained image-to-video (I2V) model and then guide the sampling process using the edited first frame. Generally, a popular choice for maintaining motion and layout from the source video is intervening in the denoising process by injecting attention during reconstruction. However, such injection often leads to unsatisfactory results, where excessive injection leads to conflicting semantics from the source video while insufficient injection brings limited source representation. Recognizing this, we propose an Editing-awaRE (REE) injection method to modulate injection intensity of each token. Specifically, we first compute the pixel difference between the source and edited first frame to form a corresponding editing mask. Next, we track the editing area throughout the entire video by using optical flow to warp the first-frame mask. Then, editing-aware feature injection intensity for each token is generated accordingly, where injection is not conducted on editing areas. Building upon REE injection, we further propose a zero-shot image-driven video editing framework with recent-emerging rectified-Flow models, dubbed FREE-Edit. Without fine-tuning or training, our FREE-Edit demonstrates effectiveness in various image-driven video editing scenarios, showing its capability to produce higher-quality outputs compared with existing techniques. Project page: https://free-edit.github.io/page/.

AI.tldr: 提出一种名为REE的编辑感知注意力注入方法，通过光流跟踪编辑区域来调制每个token的注入强度，并基于此构建了无需微调的图像驱动视频编辑框架FREE-Edit。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在视频编辑中通过注意力注入来保持源视频的运动和布局，但注入强度难以控制：过度注入会导致源视频语义冲突，注入不足则无法充分保留源视频表示。
AI.method: 首先计算源帧与编辑后第一帧的像素差异形成编辑掩码，然后使用光流将第一帧掩码变形以跟踪整个视频中的编辑区域。基于此生成编辑感知的特征注入强度，在编辑区域不进行注入。基于REE注入方法，构建了基于rectified-Flow模型的零样本图像驱动视频编辑框架FREE-Edit。
AI.result: FREE-Edit在多种图像驱动视频编辑场景中表现出有效性，无需微调或训练即可生成比现有技术更高质量的编辑结果。
AI.conclusion: 提出的REE注入方法能够有效调制注意力注入强度，基于此构建的FREE-Edit框架在零样本设置下实现了高质量的图像驱动视频编辑。

title: MixerCSeg: An Efficient Mixer Architecture for Crack Segmentation via Decoupled Mamba Attention
summary: Feature encoders play a key role in pixel-level crack segmentation by shaping the representation of fine textures and thin structures. Existing CNN-, Transformer-, and Mamba-based models each capture only part of the required spatial or structural information, leaving clear gaps in modeling complex crack patterns. To address this, we present MixerCSeg, a mixer architecture designed like a coordinated team of specialists, where CNN-like pathways focus on local textures, Transformer-style paths capture global dependencies, and Mamba-inspired flows model sequential context within a single encoder. At the core of MixerCSeg is the TransMixer, which explores Mamba's latent attention behavior while establishing dedicated pathways that naturally express both locality and global awareness. To further enhance structural fidelity, we introduce a spatial block processing strategy and a Direction-guided Edge Gated Convolution (DEGConv) that strengthens edge sensitivity under irregular crack geometries with minimal computational overhead. A Spatial Refinement Multi-Level Fusion (SRF) module is then employed to refine multi-scale details without increasing complexity. Extensive experiments on multiple crack segmentation benchmarks show that MixerCSeg achieves state-of-the-art performance with only 2.05 GFLOPs and 2.54 M parameters, demonstrating both efficiency and strong representational capability. The code is available at https://github.com/spiderforest/MixerCSeg.

AI.tldr: MixerCSeg：一种用于像素级裂缝分割的混合架构，结合了CNN、Transformer和Mamba的优势，通过专用路径分别处理局部纹理、全局依赖和序列上下文，在保持高效的同时实现了最先进的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有CNN、Transformer和Mamba模型在裂缝分割中各自只能捕捉部分所需的空间或结构信息，无法全面建模复杂的裂缝模式，存在明显的建模空白。
AI.method: 提出MixerCSeg混合架构，核心是TransMixer模块，探索Mamba的潜在注意力行为并建立专用路径表达局部性和全局感知。采用空间块处理策略和方向引导边缘门控卷积（DEGConv）增强边缘敏感性，使用空间细化多级融合（SRF）模块优化多尺度细节。
AI.result: 在多个裂缝分割基准测试中，MixerCSeg以仅2.05 GFLOPs和2.54M参数实现了最先进的性能，展示了高效性和强大的表征能力。
AI.conclusion: MixerCSeg通过协调CNN、Transformer和Mamba的优势，有效解决了裂缝分割中复杂模式建模的挑战，在保持计算效率的同时实现了卓越的性能。

title: VP-Hype: A Hybrid Mamba-Transformer Framework with Visual-Textual Prompting for Hyperspectral Image Classification
summary: Accurate classification of hyperspectral imagery (HSI) is often frustrated by the tension between high-dimensional spectral data and the extreme scarcity of labeled training samples. While hierarchical models like LoLA-SpecViT have demonstrated the power of local windowed attention and parameter-efficient fine-tuning, the quadratic complexity of standard Transformers remains a barrier to scaling. We introduce VP-Hype, a framework that rethinks HSI classification by unifying the linear-time efficiency of State-Space Models (SSMs) with the relational modeling of Transformers in a novel hybrid architecture. Building on a robust 3D-CNN spectral front-end, VP-Hype replaces conventional attention blocks with a Hybrid Mamba-Transformer backbone to capture long-range dependencies with significantly reduced computational overhead. Furthermore, we address the label-scarcity problem by integrating dual-modal Visual and Textual Prompts that provide context-aware guidance for the feature extraction process. Our experimental evaluation demonstrates that VP-Hype establishes a new state of the art in low-data regimes. Specifically, with a training sample distribution of only 2\%, the model achieves Overall Accuracy (OA) of 99.69\% on the Salinas dataset and 99.45\% on the Longkou dataset. These results suggest that the convergence of hybrid sequence modeling and multi-modal prompting provides a robust path forward for high-performance, sample-efficient remote sensing.

AI.tldr: VP-Hype：一种结合状态空间模型和Transformer的混合架构，用于高光谱图像分类，在低样本条件下实现SOTA性能
AI.motivation: 高光谱图像分类面临高维光谱数据与标注样本稀缺的矛盾，传统Transformer的二次复杂度限制了扩展性，需要更高效的模型来处理长距离依赖关系
AI.method: 1. 使用3D-CNN作为光谱前端；2. 用混合Mamba-Transformer骨干网络替代传统注意力块，结合状态空间模型的线性时间效率和Transformer的关系建模能力；3. 集成视觉和文本双模态提示，为特征提取提供上下文感知指导
AI.result: 在低数据条件下达到新的SOTA：仅使用2%训练样本时，在Salinas数据集上OA达到99.69%，在Longkou数据集上达到99.45%
AI.conclusion: 混合序列建模与多模态提示的结合为高性能、样本高效的遥感分类提供了稳健的前进路径

title: RnG: A Unified Transformer for Complete 3D Modeling from Partial Observations
summary: Human perceive the 3D world through 2D observations from limited viewpoints. While recent feed-forward generalizable 3D reconstruction models excel at recovering 3D structures from sparse images, their representations are often confined to observed regions, leaving unseen geometry un-modeled. This raises a key, fundamental challenge: Can we infer a complete 3D structure from partial 2D observations? We present RnG (Reconstruction and Generation), a novel feed-forward Transformer that unifies these two tasks by predicting an implicit, complete 3D representation. At the core of RnG, we propose a reconstruction-guided causal attention mechanism that separates reconstruction and generation at the attention level, and treats the KV-cache as an implicit 3D representation. Then, arbitrary poses can efficiently query this cache to render high-fidelity, novel-view RGBD outputs. As a result, RnG not only accurately reconstructs visible geometry but also generates plausible, coherent unseen geometry and appearance. Our method achieves state-of-the-art performance in both generalizable 3D reconstruction and novel view generation, while operating efficiently enough for real-time interactive applications. Project page: https://npucvr.github.io/RnG

AI.tldr: RnG是一个统一的Transformer模型，通过重建引导的因果注意力机制，从稀疏2D观测中预测完整的3D表示，既能准确重建可见几何，又能生成合理连贯的未见几何和外观。
AI.motivation: 现有前馈式通用3D重建模型通常局限于观测区域，无法建模未见的几何结构。本文旨在解决从部分2D观测推断完整3D结构这一根本性挑战。
AI.method: 提出RnG（重建与生成）模型，核心是重建引导的因果注意力机制，将重建和生成在注意力层面分离，将KV缓存作为隐式3D表示，通过任意姿态查询该缓存来渲染高质量的新视角RGBD输出。
AI.result: 在通用3D重建和新视角生成任务上均达到最先进性能，同时计算效率足够支持实时交互应用。
AI.conclusion: RnG成功统一了3D重建和生成任务，能够从稀疏观测中预测完整的3D表示，在准确性和效率方面都表现出色。

title: VidDoS: Universal Denial-of-Service Attack on Video-based Large Language Models
summary: Video-LLMs are increasingly deployed in safety-critical applications but are vulnerable to Energy-Latency Attacks (ELAs) that exhaust computational resources. Current image-centric methods fail because temporal aggregation mechanisms dilute individual frame perturbations. Additionally, real-time demands make instance-wise optimization impractical for continuous video streams. We introduce VidDoS, which is the first universal ELA framework tailored for Video-LLMs. Our method leverages universal optimization to create instance-agnostic triggers that require no inference-time gradient calculation. We achieve this through $\textit{masked teacher forcing}$ to steer models toward expensive target sequences, combined with a $\textit{refusal penalty}$ and $\textit{early-termination suppression}$ to override conciseness priors. Testing across three mainstream Video-LLMs and three video datasets, which include video question answering and autonomous driving scenarios, shows extreme degradation. VidDoS induces a token expansion of more than 205$\times$ and inflates the inference latency by more than 15$\times$ relative to clean baselines. Simulations of real-time autonomous driving streams further reveal that this induced latency leads to critical safety violations. We urge the community to recognize and mitigate these high-hazard ELA in Video-LLMs.

AI.tldr: VidDoS是首个针对视频大语言模型的通用能耗-延迟攻击框架，通过实例无关的触发器实现无需推理时梯度计算，能显著增加模型输出长度和推理延迟，在自动驾驶等安全关键应用中造成严重安全隐患。
AI.motivation: 视频大语言模型越来越多地部署在安全关键应用中，但容易受到能耗-延迟攻击的威胁。现有的图像中心方法因时间聚合机制会稀释单帧扰动而失效，且实时需求使得实例级优化不适用于连续视频流。
AI.method: 提出VidDoS框架，采用通用优化方法创建实例无关的触发器，无需推理时梯度计算。核心包括：1) 掩码教师强制引导模型生成昂贵的目标序列；2) 拒绝惩罚机制；3) 提前终止抑制机制，以覆盖简洁性先验。
AI.result: 在三个主流视频大语言模型和三个视频数据集（包括视频问答和自动驾驶场景）上测试显示极端性能下降：VidDoS导致token数量增加超过205倍，推理延迟增加超过15倍。自动驾驶流模拟显示诱导的延迟会导致关键安全违规。
AI.conclusion: VidDoS揭示了视频大语言模型存在高风险的能耗-延迟攻击漏洞，呼吁社区认识并缓解这些高危害性攻击，特别是在安全关键应用中。

title: CoSMo3D: Open-World Promptable 3D Semantic Part Segmentation through LLM-Guided Canonical Spatial Modeling
summary: Open-world promptable 3D semantic segmentation remains brittle as semantics are inferred in the input sensor coordinates. Yet, humans, in contrast, interpret parts via functional roles in a canonical space -- wings extend laterally, handles protrude to the side, and legs support from below. Psychophysical evidence shows that we mentally rotate objects into canonical frames to reveal these roles. To fill this gap, we propose \methodName{}, which attains canonical space perception by inducing a latent canonical reference frame learned directly from data. By construction, we create a unified canonical dataset through LLM-guided intra- and cross-category alignment, exposing canonical spatial regularities across 200 categories. By induction, we realize canonicality inside the model through a dual-branch architecture with canonical map anchoring and canonical box calibration, collapsing pose variation and symmetry into a stable canonical embedding. This shift from input pose space to canonical embedding yields far more stable and transferable part semantics. Experimental results show that \methodName{} establishes new state of the art in open-world promptable 3D segmentation.

AI.tldr: 论文提出CanonicalMap方法，通过学习潜在规范参考框架，将3D语义分割从输入传感器坐标转移到规范空间，显著提升开放世界可提示3D分割的稳定性和可迁移性。
AI.motivation: 当前开放世界可提示3D语义分割在输入传感器坐标系中表现脆弱，而人类通过功能角色在规范空间中解释物体部件。心理学证据表明人类会将物体心理旋转到规范框架来揭示功能角色，因此需要填补这一差距。
AI.method: 提出CanonicalMap方法：1）通过LLM引导的类别内和跨类别对齐创建统一的规范数据集；2）采用双分支架构，通过规范图锚定和规范框校准实现规范嵌入，将姿态变化和对称性折叠到稳定的规范表示中。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，CanonicalMap在开放世界可提示3D分割任务中建立了新的最先进性能，实现了更稳定和可迁移的部件语义。
AI.conclusion: 通过从输入姿态空间转移到规范嵌入空间，CanonicalMap显著提升了3D语义分割的稳定性和可迁移性，为开放世界可提示3D分割提供了新的解决方案。

title: ATA: Bridging Implicit Reasoning with Attention-Guided and Action-Guided Inference for Vision-Language Action Models
summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models rely on current observations, including images, language instructions, and robot states, to predict actions and complete tasks. While accurate visual perception is crucial for precise action prediction and execution, recent work has attempted to further improve performance by introducing explicit reasoning during inference. However, such approaches face significant limitations. They often depend on data-intensive resources such as Chain-of-Thought (CoT) style annotations to decompose tasks into step-by-step reasoning, and in many cases require additional visual grounding annotations (e.g., bounding boxes or masks) to highlight relevant image regions. Moreover, they involve time-consuming dataset construction, labeling, and retraining, which ultimately results in longer inference sequences and reduced efficiency. To address these challenges, we propose ATA, a novel training-free framework that introduces implicit reasoning into VLA inference through complementary attention-guided and action-guided strategies. Unlike CoT or explicit visual-grounding methods, ATA formulates reasoning implicitly by integrating attention maps with an action-based region of interest (RoI), thereby adaptively refining visual inputs without requiring extra training or annotations. ATA is a plug-and-play implicit reasoning approach for VLA models, lightweight yet effective. Extensive experiments show that it consistently improves task success and robustness while preserving, and even enhancing, inference efficiency.

AI.tldr: ATA是一个无需训练的VLA模型推理框架，通过注意力引导和动作引导策略引入隐式推理，提升任务成功率而不需要额外标注或训练。
AI.motivation: 现有VLA模型依赖显式推理方法（如思维链、视觉定位标注），需要大量数据标注和重新训练，导致推理效率低下。需要一种无需额外训练和标注的隐式推理方法。
AI.method: 提出ATA框架，通过注意力引导和动作引导策略进行隐式推理。将注意力图与基于动作的兴趣区域结合，自适应地细化视觉输入，无需额外训练或标注。
AI.result: 实验表明ATA能持续提升任务成功率和鲁棒性，同时保持甚至提升推理效率。这是一个轻量级即插即用的隐式推理方法。
AI.conclusion: ATA通过隐式推理有效解决了VLA模型中显式推理方法的局限性，无需额外训练或标注即可提升性能，具有实用性和高效性。

title: Towards Policy-Adaptive Image Guardrail: Benchmark and Method
summary: Accurate rejection of sensitive or harmful visual content, i.e., harmful image guardrail, is critical in many application scenarios. This task must continuously adapt to the evolving safety policies and content across various domains and over time. However, traditional classifiers, confined to fixed categories, require frequent retraining when new policies are introduced. Vision-language models (VLMs) offer a more adaptable and generalizable foundation for dynamic safety guardrails. Despite this potential, existing VLM-based safeguarding methods are typically trained and evaluated under only a fixed safety policy. We find that these models are heavily overfitted to the seen policy, fail to generalize to unseen policies, and even lose the basic instruction-following ability and general knowledge. To address this issue, in this paper we make two key contributions. First, we benchmark the cross-policy generalization performance of existing VLMs with SafeEditBench, a new evaluation suite. SafeEditBench leverages image-editing models to convert unsafe images into safe counterparts, producing policy-aligned datasets where each safe-unsafe image pair remains visually similar except for localized regions violating specific safety rules. Human annotators then provide accurate safe/unsafe labels under five distinct policies, enabling fine-grained assessment of policy-aware generalization. Second, we introduce SafeGuard-VL, a reinforcement learning-based method with verifiable rewards (RLVR) for robust unsafe-image guardrails. Instead of relying solely on supervised fine-tuning (SFT) under fixed policies, SafeGuard-VL explicitly optimizes the model with policy-grounded rewards, promoting verifiable adaptation across evolving policies. Extensive experiments verify the effectiveness of our method for unsafe image guardrails across various policies.

AI.tldr: 提出SafeEditBench基准和SafeGuard-VL方法，解决视觉语言模型在有害图像防护中跨策略泛化能力不足的问题
AI.motivation: 传统分类器需要频繁重新训练以适应新的安全策略，而现有VLM防护方法过度拟合特定策略，无法泛化到未见策略，甚至丧失基本指令遵循能力
AI.method: 1) 创建SafeEditBench评估套件，利用图像编辑模型生成安全-不安全图像对；2) 提出SafeGuard-VL方法，采用基于可验证奖励的强化学习优化模型跨策略适应能力
AI.result: 实验验证了SafeGuard-VL方法在各种安全策略下的有效性，显著提升了有害图像防护的跨策略泛化性能
AI.conclusion: 通过SafeEditBench基准和SafeGuard-VL方法，成功解决了VLM在动态安全防护中的策略泛化问题，为适应性有害图像防护提供了有效解决方案

title: Retrieval, Refinement, and Ranking for Text-to-Video Generation via Prompt Optimization and Test-Time Scaling
summary: While large-scale datasets have driven significant progress in Text-to-Video (T2V) generative models, these models remain highly sensitive to input prompts, demonstrating that prompt design is critical to generation quality. Current methods for improving video output often fall short: they either depend on complex, post-editing models, risking the introduction of artifacts, or require expensive fine-tuning of the core generator, which severely limits both scalability and accessibility. In this work, we introduce 3R, a novel RAG based prompt optimization framework. 3R utilizes the power of current state-of-the-art T2V diffusion model and vision language model. It can be used with any T2V model without any kind of model training. The framework leverages three key strategies: RAG-based modifiers extraction for enriched contextual grounding, diffusion-based Preference Optimization for aligning outputs with human preferences, and temporal frame interpolation for producing temporally consistent visual contents. Together, these components enable more accurate, efficient, and contextually aligned text-to-video generation. Experimental results demonstrate the efficacy of 3R in enhancing the static fidelity and dynamic coherence of generated videos, underscoring the importance of optimizing user prompts.

AI.tldr: 3R是一个基于RAG的提示优化框架，无需训练即可提升文本到视频生成质量，通过提取修饰词、偏好优化和时间插值实现更准确、高效的视频生成。
AI.motivation: 当前文本到视频生成模型对输入提示高度敏感，现有改进方法要么依赖复杂的后处理模型（可能引入伪影），要么需要昂贵的微调（限制可扩展性和可访问性）。
AI.method: 3R框架结合三种策略：1) RAG-based修饰词提取增强上下文基础；2) 基于扩散的偏好优化使输出符合人类偏好；3) 时间帧插值产生时间一致的视觉内容。无需训练即可与任何T2V模型配合使用。
AI.result: 实验结果表明3R能有效提升生成视频的静态保真度和动态连贯性，证明了优化用户提示的重要性。
AI.conclusion: 3R框架通过提示优化而非模型修改，提供了一种可扩展、易访问的方法来改善文本到视频生成质量，强调了提示设计在生成系统中的关键作用。

title: AgilePruner: An Empirical Study of Attention and Diversity for Adaptive Visual Token Pruning in Large Vision-Language Models
summary: Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) have adopted visual token pruning strategies to mitigate substantial computational overhead incurred by extensive visual token sequences. While prior works primarily focus on either attention-based or diversity-based pruning methods, in-depth analysis of these approaches' characteristics and limitations remains largely unexplored. In this work, we conduct thorough empirical analysis using effective rank (erank) as a measure of feature diversity and attention score entropy to investigate visual token processing mechanisms and analyze the strengths and weaknesses of each approach. Our analysis reveals two insights: (1) Our erank-based quantitative analysis shows that many diversity-oriented pruning methods preserve substantially less feature diversity than intended; moreover, analysis using the CHAIR dataset reveals that the diversity they do retain is closely tied to increased hallucination frequency compared to attention-based pruning. (2) We further observe that attention-based approaches are more effective on simple images where visual evidence is concentrated, while diversity-based methods better handle complex images with distributed features. Building on these empirical insights, we show that incorporating image-aware adjustments into existing hybrid pruning strategies consistently improves their performance. We also provide a minimal instantiation of our empirical findings through a simple adaptive pruning mechanism, which achieves strong and reliable performance across standard benchmarks as well as hallucination-specific evaluations. Our project page available at https://cvsp-lab.github.io/AgilePruner.

AI.tldr: 本文通过有效秩和注意力熵分析视觉token剪枝方法，发现多样性剪枝保留的特征多样性有限且与幻觉相关，注意力剪枝在简单图像更有效，多样性剪枝在复杂图像更好，提出自适应剪枝机制提升性能。
AI.motivation: 大型视觉语言模型中视觉token剪枝策略存在计算开销问题，现有注意力剪枝和多样性剪枝方法缺乏深入分析，需要研究这些方法的特性和局限性。
AI.method: 使用有效秩衡量特征多样性，注意力熵分析视觉token处理机制，通过CHAIR数据集分析幻觉频率，比较注意力剪枝和多样性剪枝在不同图像类型的效果。
AI.result: 发现多样性剪枝保留的特征多样性比预期少且与幻觉频率相关；注意力剪枝在简单图像更有效，多样性剪枝在复杂图像更好；提出自适应剪枝机制在标准基准和幻觉评估中表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 深入分析视觉token剪枝方法特性，发现不同类型剪枝的适用场景不同，基于经验洞察提出图像感知的自适应剪枝策略能显著提升性能。

title: Pri4R: Learning World Dynamics for Vision-Language-Action Models with Privileged 4D Representation
summary: Humans learn not only how their bodies move, but also how the surrounding world responds to their actions. In contrast, while recent Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models exhibit impressive semantic understanding, they often fail to capture the spatiotemporal dynamics governing physical interaction. In this paper, we introduce Pri4R, a simple yet effective approach that endows VLA models with an implicit understanding of world dynamics by leveraging privileged 4D information during training. Specifically, Pri4R augments VLAs with a lightweight point track head that predicts 3D point tracks. By injecting VLA features into this head to jointly predict future 3D trajectories, the model learns to incorporate evolving scene geometry within its shared representation space, enabling more physically aware context for precise control. Due to its architectural simplicity, Pri4R is compatible with dominant VLA design patterns with minimal changes. During inference, we run the model using the original VLA architecture unchanged; Pri4R adds no extra inputs, outputs, or computational overhead. Across simulation and real-world evaluations, Pri4R significantly improves performance on challenging manipulation tasks, including a +10% gain on LIBERO-Long and a +40% gain on RoboCasa. We further show that 3D point track prediction is an effective supervision target for learning action-world dynamics, and validate our design choices through extensive ablations.

AI.tldr: Pri4R通过训练时利用特权4D信息，让VLA模型获得对世界动态的隐式理解，提升物理交互任务的性能
AI.motivation: 当前的VLA模型虽然具备语义理解能力，但缺乏对物理交互时空动态的捕捉，而人类不仅能学习身体动作，还能理解环境对动作的响应
AI.method: Pri4R为VLA模型添加轻量级点轨迹预测头，通过注入VLA特征联合预测未来3D轨迹，让模型学习将演化的场景几何融入共享表示空间
AI.result: 在仿真和真实世界评估中，Pri4R显著提升挑战性操作任务性能：LIBERO-Long提升10%，RoboCasa提升40%；3D点轨迹预测是学习动作-世界动态的有效监督目标
AI.conclusion: Pri4R通过简单有效的方法让VLA模型获得对世界动态的隐式理解，兼容主流VLA架构且推理时不增加额外开销，显著提升物理交互任务的性能

title: Cross-Modal Guidance for Fast Diffusion-Based Computed Tomography
comment: Accepted at the IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech, and Signal Processing (ICASSP) 2026
summary: Diffusion models have emerged as powerful priors for solving inverse problems in computed tomography (CT). In certain applications, such as neutron CT, it can be expensive to collect large amounts of measurements even for a single scan, leading to sparse data sets from which it is challenging to obtain high quality reconstructions even with diffusion models. One strategy to mitigate this challenge is to leverage a complementary, easily available imaging modality; however, such approaches typically require retraining the diffusion model with large datasets. In this work, we propose incorporating an additional modality without retraining the diffusion prior, enabling accelerated imaging of costly modalities. We further examine the impact of imperfect side modalities on cross-modal guidance. Our method is evaluated on sparse-view neutron computed tomography, where reconstruction quality is substantially improved by incorporating X-ray computed tomography of the same samples.

AI.tldr: 提出一种无需重新训练扩散模型即可整合额外成像模态的方法，用于改善稀疏数据CT重建，特别针对中子CT应用
AI.motivation: 中子CT等昂贵成像方式难以收集大量测量数据，导致稀疏数据集重建质量差。现有跨模态方法通常需要重新训练扩散模型，计算成本高
AI.method: 提出无需重新训练扩散先验的跨模态引导方法，利用易于获取的互补成像模态（如X射线CT）来指导稀疏中子CT重建
AI.result: 在稀疏视角中子CT重建中，通过整合相同样本的X射线CT数据，重建质量得到显著改善
AI.conclusion: 该方法能够有效利用互补成像模态提升昂贵成像方式的重建质量，无需重新训练扩散模型，同时研究了不完美侧模态对跨模态引导的影响

title: SkeleGuide: Explicit Skeleton Reasoning for Context-Aware Human-in-Place Image Synthesis
summary: Generating realistic and structurally plausible human images into existing scenes remains a significant challenge for current generative models, which often produce artifacts like distorted limbs and unnatural poses. We attribute this systemic failure to an inability to perform explicit reasoning over human skeletal structure. To address this, we introduce SkeleGuide, a novel framework built upon explicit skeletal reasoning. Through joint training of its reasoning and rendering stages, SkeleGuide learns to produce an internal pose that acts as a strong structural prior, guiding the synthesis towards high structural integrity. For fine-grained user control, we introduce PoseInverter, a module that decodes this internal latent pose into an explicit and editable format. Extensive experiments demonstrate that SkeleGuide significantly outperforms both specialized and general-purpose models in generating high-fidelity, contextually-aware human images. Our work provides compelling evidence that explicitly modeling skeletal structure is a fundamental step towards robust and plausible human image synthesis.

AI.tldr: SkeleGuide：基于显式骨骼推理的框架，通过联合训练推理和渲染阶段，生成内部姿态作为结构先验，显著提升人体图像合成的结构合理性和真实性。
AI.motivation: 当前生成模型在将逼真且结构合理的人体图像合成到现有场景中存在显著挑战，经常产生肢体扭曲和不自然姿态等伪影。作者认为这种系统性失败源于无法对骨骼结构进行显式推理。
AI.method: 引入SkeleGuide框架，基于显式骨骼推理，通过联合训练推理和渲染阶段，学习生成内部姿态作为结构先验。还提出PoseInverter模块，将内部潜在姿态解码为显式可编辑格式，实现细粒度用户控制。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，SkeleGuide在生成高保真、上下文感知的人体图像方面显著优于专业和通用模型。该框架在结构完整性和真实性方面表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 显式建模骨骼结构是实现鲁棒且合理的人体图像合成的关键步骤。SkeleGuide通过骨骼推理提供了有效的解决方案，为高质量人体图像生成开辟了新途径。

title: FoSS: Modeling Long Range Dependencies and Multimodal Uncertainty in Trajectory Prediction via Fourier State Space Integration
summary: Accurate trajectory prediction is vital for safe autonomous driving, yet existing approaches struggle to balance modeling power and computational efficiency. Attention-based architectures incur quadratic complexity with increasing agents, while recurrent models struggle to capture long-range dependencies and fine-grained local dynamics. Building upon this, we present FoSS, a dual-branch framework that unifies frequency-domain reasoning with linear-time sequence modeling. The frequency-domain branch performs a discrete Fourier transform to decompose trajectories into amplitude components encoding global intent and phase components capturing local variations, followed by a progressive helix reordering module that preserves spectral order; two selective state-space submodules, Coarse2Fine-SSM and SpecEvolve-SSM, refine spectral features with O(N) complexity. In parallel, a time-domain dynamic selective SSM reconstructs self-attention behavior in linear time to retain long-range temporal context. A cross-attention layer fuses temporal and spectral representations, while learnable queries generate multiple candidate trajectories, and a weighted fusion head expresses motion uncertainty. Experiments on Argoverse 1 and Argoverse 2 benchmarks demonstrate that FoSS achieves state-of-the-art accuracy while reducing computation by 22.5% and parameters by over 40%. Comprehensive ablations confirm the necessity of each component.

AI.tldr: FoSS：一种用于自动驾驶轨迹预测的双分支框架，结合频域推理和线性时间序列建模，在保持高精度的同时显著降低计算和参数需求
AI.motivation: 现有轨迹预测方法难以平衡建模能力和计算效率。基于注意力的架构随着智能体数量增加呈现二次复杂度，而循环模型难以捕捉长距离依赖和细粒度局部动态
AI.method: 提出FoSS双分支框架：1）频域分支通过离散傅里叶变换将轨迹分解为振幅（全局意图）和相位（局部变化）分量，采用渐进螺旋重排序模块保持谱序，使用两个选择性状态空间子模块（Coarse2Fine-SSM和SpecEvolve-SSM）以O(N)复杂度细化谱特征；2）时域动态选择性SSM在线性时间内重建自注意力行为以保留长距离时间上下文；3）交叉注意力层融合时空和谱表示，可学习查询生成多个候选轨迹，加权融合头表达运动不确定性
AI.result: 在Argoverse 1和Argoverse 2基准测试中达到最先进精度，同时计算量减少22.5%，参数减少超过40%。全面消融实验证实了每个组件的必要性
AI.conclusion: FoSS通过统一频域推理和线性时间序列建模，在轨迹预测任务中实现了精度与效率的良好平衡，为自动驾驶系统提供了更实用的解决方案

title: YCDa: YCbCr Decoupled Attention for Real-time Realistic Camouflaged Object Detection
summary: Human vision exhibits remarkable adaptability in perceiving objects under camouflage. When color cues become unreliable, the visual system instinctively shifts its reliance from chrominance (color) to luminance (brightness and texture), enabling more robust perception in visually confusing environments. Drawing inspiration from this biological mechanism, we propose YCDa, an efficient early-stage feature processing strategy that embeds this "chrominance-luminance decoupling and dynamic attention" principle into modern real-time detectors. Specifically, YCDa separates color and luminance information in the input stage and dynamically allocates attention across channels to amplify discriminative cues while suppressing misleading color noise. The strategy is plug-and-play and can be integrated into existing detectors by simply replacing the first downsampling layer. Extensive experiments on multiple baselines demonstrate that YCDa consistently improves performance with negligible overhead as shown in Fig. Notably, YCDa-YOLO12s achieves a 112% improvement in mAP over the baseline on COD10K-D and sets new state-of-the-art results for real-time camouflaged object detection across COD-D datasets.

AI.tldr: YCDa是一种受人类视觉启发的早期特征处理策略，通过分离颜色和亮度信息并动态分配注意力，提升实时伪装目标检测性能，仅需替换第一个下采样层即可集成到现有检测器中。
AI.motivation: 受人类视觉系统在伪装环境下自适应感知机制的启发：当颜色线索不可靠时，视觉系统会从色度依赖转向亮度依赖，从而在视觉混淆环境中实现更鲁棒的感知。
AI.method: 提出YCDa策略：1）在输入阶段分离颜色和亮度信息；2）动态分配跨通道注意力，增强判别性线索同时抑制误导性颜色噪声；3）即插即用设计，仅需替换现有检测器的第一个下采样层。
AI.result: 在多个基线模型上验证，YCDa以可忽略的开销持续提升性能。YCDa-YOLO12s在COD10K-D上相比基线mAP提升112%，在COD-D数据集上为实时伪装目标检测设定了新的SOTA结果。
AI.conclusion: YCDa通过模拟人类视觉的色度-亮度解耦和动态注意力机制，为实时伪装目标检测提供了一种高效且通用的特征处理策略，显著提升了检测性能。

title: What Helps -- and What Hurts: Bidirectional Explanations for Vision Transformers
comment: PAKDD 2026: The 30th Pacific-Asia Conference on Knowledge Discovery and Data Mining
summary: Vision Transformers (ViTs) achieve strong performance in visual recognition, yet their decision-making remains difficult to interpret. We propose BiCAM, a bidirectional class activation mapping method that captures both supportive (positive) and suppressive (negative) contributions to model predictions. Unlike prior CAM-based approaches that discard negative signals, BiCAM preserves signed attributions to produce more complete and contrastive explanations. BiCAM further introduces a Positive-to-Negative Ratio (PNR) that summarizes attribution balance and enables lightweight detection of adversarial examples without retraining. Across ImageNet, VOC, and COCO, BiCAM improves localization and faithfulness while remaining computationally efficient. It generalizes to multiple ViT variants, including DeiT and Swin. These results suggest the importance of modeling both supportive and suppressive evidence for interpreting transformer-based vision models.

AI.tldr: BiCAM是一种双向类激活映射方法，用于解释视觉Transformer的决策，同时捕捉支持和抑制贡献，并引入正负比来检测对抗样本。
AI.motivation: 视觉Transformer在视觉识别中表现优异，但其决策过程难以解释。现有CAM方法丢弃了负信号，导致解释不完整。
AI.method: 提出BiCAM方法，保留有符号归因以产生更完整和对比性的解释。引入正负比(PNR)来总结归因平衡，实现无需重新训练的轻量级对抗样本检测。
AI.result: 在ImageNet、VOC和COCO数据集上，BiCAM提高了定位准确性和忠实度，同时保持计算效率。该方法可泛化到多种ViT变体，包括DeiT和Swin。
AI.conclusion: 结果表明，同时建模支持和抑制证据对于解释基于Transformer的视觉模型非常重要。

title: When Does RL Help Medical VLMs? Disentangling Vision, SFT, and RL Gains
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) is increasingly used to post-train medical Vision-Language Models (VLMs), yet it remains unclear whether RL improves medical visual reasoning or mainly sharpens behaviors already induced by supervised fine-tuning (SFT). We present a controlled study that disentangles these effects along three axes: vision, SFT, and RL. Using MedMNIST as a multi-modality testbed, we probe visual perception by benchmarking VLM vision towers against vision-only baselines, quantify reasoning support and sampling efficiency via Accuracy@1 versus Pass@K, and evaluate when RL closes the support gap and how gains transfer across modalities. We find that RL is most effective when the model already has non-trivial support (high Pass@K): it primarily sharpens the output distribution, improving Acc@1 and sampling efficiency, while SFT expands support and makes RL effective. Based on these findings, we propose a boundary-aware recipe and instantiate it by RL post-training an OctoMed-initialized model on a small, balanced subset of PMC multiple-choice VQA, achieving strong average performance across six medical VQA benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 本文通过控制实验研究强化学习在医学视觉语言模型中的作用，发现RL主要在SFT建立的非平凡支持基础上优化输出分布，提高准确率和采样效率，而非扩展推理能力。
AI.motivation: 当前强化学习被广泛用于医学视觉语言模型的后训练，但尚不清楚RL是否真正提升了医学视觉推理能力，还是仅仅优化了监督微调已经诱导的行为。需要明确RL在医学VLM中的作用机制。
AI.method: 使用MedMNIST作为多模态测试平台，从三个维度（视觉、SFT、RL）进行控制研究：评估VLM视觉塔与纯视觉基线的感知能力，通过Accuracy@1和Pass@K量化推理支持和采样效率，分析RL何时能弥补支持差距以及增益如何跨模态迁移。
AI.result: 研究发现RL在模型已具备非平凡支持（高Pass@K）时最有效：主要作用是锐化输出分布，提高Acc@1和采样效率；而SFT则扩展支持并使RL有效。基于此提出了边界感知的训练方案。
AI.conclusion: 提出了基于OctoMed初始化模型，在PMC多选VQA的平衡子集上进行RL后训练的实施方案，在六个医学VQA基准测试中取得了优异的平均性能，为医学VLM训练提供了有效指导。

title: Open-Vocabulary vs Supervised Learning Methods for Post-Disaster Visual Scene Understanding
summary: Aerial imagery is critical for large-scale post-disaster damage assessment. Automated interpretation remains challenging due to clutter, visual variability, and strong cross-event domain shift, while supervised approaches still rely on costly, task-specific annotations with limited coverage across disaster types and regions. Recent open-vocabulary and foundation vision models offer an appealing alternative, by reducing dependence on fixed label sets and extensive task-specific annotations. Instead, they leverage large-scale pretraining and vision-language representations. These properties are particularly relevant for post-disaster domains, where visual concepts are ambiguous and data availability is constrained. In this work, we present a comparative evaluation of supervised learning and open-vocabulary vision models for post-disaster scene understanding, focusing on semantic segmentation and object detection across multiple datasets, including FloodNet+, RescueNet, DFire, and LADD. We examine performance trends, failure modes, and practical trade-offs between different learning paradigms, providing insight into their applicability for real-world disaster response. The most notable remark across all evaluated benchmarks is that supervised training remains the most reliable approach (i.e., when the label space is fixed and annotations are available), especially for small objects and fine boundary delineation in cluttered scenes.

AI.tldr: 监督学习方法在灾后场景理解中仍然是最可靠的方法，特别是在固定标签集和标注可用的情况下，对小物体和杂乱场景中的精细边界划分表现最佳。
AI.motivation: 灾后航空影像分析面临自动化挑战，包括视觉杂乱、变化大和跨事件领域偏移。监督方法依赖昂贵、特定任务的标注，覆盖灾害类型和区域有限。开放词汇和基础视觉模型提供了有吸引力的替代方案，减少对固定标签集和大量任务特定标注的依赖。
AI.method: 对监督学习和开放词汇视觉模型在灾后场景理解中进行比较评估，重点关注语义分割和物体检测，使用多个数据集包括FloodNet+、RescueNet、DFire和LADD。分析性能趋势、失败模式和不同学习范式之间的实际权衡。
AI.result: 在所有评估的基准测试中，最显著的发现是监督训练仍然是最可靠的方法（当标签空间固定且标注可用时），特别是对于小物体和杂乱场景中的精细边界划分。
AI.conclusion: 监督学习在灾后场景理解中保持优势，特别是在有标注数据的情况下。开放词汇模型虽然减少了标注依赖，但在小物体检测和精细边界划分等关键任务上仍不及监督方法。研究为实际灾害响应应用提供了不同学习范式的适用性见解。

title: Perspective-Equivariant Fine-tuning for Multispectral Demosaicing without Ground Truth
summary: Multispectral demosaicing is crucial to reconstruct full-resolution spectral images from snapshot mosaiced measurements, enabling real-time imaging from neurosurgery to autonomous driving. Classical methods are blurry, while supervised learning requires costly ground truth (GT) obtained from slow line-scanning systems. We propose Perspective-Equivariant Fine-tuning for Demosaicing (PEFD), a framework that learns multispectral demosaicing from mosaiced measurements alone. PEFD a) exploits the projective geometry of camera-based imaging systems to leverage a richer group structure than previous demosaicing methods to recover more null-space information, and b) learns efficiently without GT by adapting pretrained foundation models designed for 1-3 channel imaging. On intraoperative and automotive datasets, PEFD recovers fine details such as blood vessels and preserves spectral fidelity, substantially outperforming recent approaches, nearing supervised performance.

AI.tldr: PEFD是一种无需地面真值的多光谱去马赛克方法，利用相机成像系统的投影几何和预训练基础模型，在神经外科和自动驾驶数据集上实现接近监督方法的性能
AI.motivation: 多光谱去马赛克对于从快照马赛克测量重建全分辨率光谱图像至关重要，但传统方法模糊，监督学习需要从缓慢的线扫描系统获取昂贵的地面真值数据
AI.method: 提出透视等变微调去马赛克(PEFD)框架：a)利用相机成像系统的投影几何，比先前方法利用更丰富的群结构来恢复更多零空间信息；b)通过适配为1-3通道成像设计的预训练基础模型，无需地面真值高效学习
AI.result: 在神经外科和自动驾驶数据集上，PEFD恢复了血管等精细细节并保持光谱保真度，显著优于近期方法，接近监督方法的性能
AI.conclusion: PEFD框架通过利用投影几何和预训练模型，实现了无需地面真值的多光谱去马赛克，在真实应用场景中表现出色，接近监督方法的性能

title: MVR: Multi-view Video Reward Shaping for Reinforcement Learning
summary: Reward design is of great importance for solving complex tasks with reinforcement learning. Recent studies have explored using image-text similarity produced by vision-language models (VLMs) to augment rewards of a task with visual feedback. A common practice linearly adds VLM scores to task or success rewards without explicit shaping, potentially altering the optimal policy. Moreover, such approaches, often relying on single static images, struggle with tasks whose desired behavior involves complex, dynamic motions spanning multiple visually different states. Furthermore, single viewpoints can occlude critical aspects of an agent's behavior. To address these issues, this paper presents Multi-View Video Reward Shaping (MVR), a framework that models the relevance of states regarding the target task using videos captured from multiple viewpoints. MVR leverages video-text similarity from a frozen pre-trained VLM to learn a state relevance function that mitigates the bias towards specific static poses inherent in image-based methods. Additionally, we introduce a state-dependent reward shaping formulation that integrates task-specific rewards and VLM-based guidance, automatically reducing the influence of VLM guidance once the desired motion pattern is achieved. We confirm the efficacy of the proposed framework with extensive experiments on challenging humanoid locomotion tasks from HumanoidBench and manipulation tasks from MetaWorld, verifying the design choices through ablation studies.

AI.tldr: MVR提出多视角视频奖励塑形框架，利用视频-文本相似度学习状态相关性函数，解决基于图像的VLM奖励方法在动态复杂任务中的局限性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于视觉语言模型(VLM)的奖励设计方法存在三个主要问题：1) 简单线性添加VLM分数可能改变最优策略；2) 依赖单张静态图像难以处理涉及多个视觉不同状态的复杂动态运动；3) 单视角可能遮挡关键行为信息。
AI.method: 提出多视角视频奖励塑形(MVR)框架：1) 使用多视角视频捕捉动态行为；2) 利用冻结预训练VLM的视频-文本相似度学习状态相关性函数；3) 引入状态依赖的奖励塑形公式，在达到期望运动模式后自动减少VLM指导的影响。
AI.result: 在HumanoidBench的人形机器人运动任务和MetaWorld的操纵任务上进行了广泛实验，验证了框架的有效性，并通过消融研究确认了设计选择。
AI.conclusion: MVR框架通过多视角视频和状态依赖奖励塑形，有效解决了基于图像的VLM奖励方法在复杂动态任务中的局限性，为强化学习奖励设计提供了新思路。

title: Cross-modal Identity Mapping: Minimizing Information Loss in Modality Conversion via Reinforcement Learning
summary: Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) often omit or misrepresent critical visual content in generated image captions. Minimizing such information loss will force LVLMs to focus on image details to generate precise descriptions. However, measuring information loss during modality conversion is inherently challenging due to the modal gap between visual content and text output. In this paper, we argue that the quality of an image caption is positively correlated with the similarity between images retrieved via text search using that caption. Based on this insight, we further propose Cross-modal Identity Mapping (CIM), a reinforcement learning framework that enhances image captioning without requiring additional annotations. Specifically, the method quantitatively evaluates the information loss from two perspectives: Gallery Representation Consistency and Query-gallery Image Relevance. Supervised under these metrics, LVLM minimizes information loss and aims to achieve identity mapping from images to captions. The experimental results demonstrate the superior performance of our method in image captioning, even when compared with Supervised Fine-Tuning. Particularly, on the COCO-LN500 benchmark, CIM achieves a 20% improvement in relation reasoning on Qwen2.5-VL-7B.The code will be released when the paper is accepted.

AI.tldr: 提出Cross-modal Identity Mapping (CIM)强化学习框架，通过文本检索图像相似度评估信息损失，无需额外标注即可提升LVLM图像描述质量
AI.motivation: 大型视觉语言模型在生成图像描述时经常遗漏或误判关键视觉内容，模态转换中的信息损失难以直接测量
AI.method: 提出跨模态身份映射(CIM)强化学习框架，从图库表示一致性和查询-图库图像相关性两个角度量化信息损失，通过强化学习优化模型
AI.result: 在COCO-LN500基准测试中，CIM在Qwen2.5-VL-7B上实现了关系推理20%的提升，性能优于监督微调
AI.conclusion: 通过文本检索图像相似度评估信息损失是有效的，CIM框架能够显著提升LVLM图像描述质量，无需额外标注

title: TIMI: Training-Free Image-to-3D Multi-Instance Generation with Spatial Fidelity
summary: Precise spatial fidelity in Image-to-3D multi-instance generation is critical for downstream real-world applications. Recent work attempts to address this by fine-tuning pre-trained Image-to-3D (I23D) models on multi-instance datasets, which incurs substantial training overhead and struggles to guarantee spatial fidelity. In fact, we observe that pre-trained I23D models already possess meaningful spatial priors, which remain underutilized as evidenced by instance entanglement issues. Motivated by this, we propose TIMI, a novel Training-free framework for Image-to-3D Multi-Instance generation that achieves high spatial fidelity. Specifically, we first introduce an Instance-aware Separation Guidance (ISG) module, which facilitates instance disentanglement during the early denoising stage. Next, to stabilize the guidance introduced by ISG, we devise a Spatial-stabilized Geometry-adaptive Update (SGU) module that promotes the preservation of the geometric characteristics of instances while maintaining their relative relationships. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method yields better performance in terms of both global layout and distinct local instances compared to existing multi-instance methods, without requiring additional training and with faster inference speed.

AI.tldr: TIMI是一个无需训练的图像到3D多实例生成框架，通过实例感知分离引导和空间稳定几何自适应更新模块，实现了高空间保真度的多实例3D生成。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过在多实例数据集上微调预训练模型，训练开销大且难以保证空间保真度。研究发现预训练模型已具备有意义的空间先验但未被充分利用，存在实例纠缠问题。
AI.method: 提出TIMI框架：1）实例感知分离引导（ISG）模块，在早期去噪阶段促进实例解纠缠；2）空间稳定几何自适应更新（SGU）模块，稳定ISG引导，保持实例几何特征和相对关系。
AI.result: 实验表明，TIMI在全局布局和局部实例区分方面优于现有方法，无需额外训练且推理速度更快。
AI.conclusion: TIMI通过有效利用预训练模型的空间先验，实现了无需训练的高空间保真度图像到3D多实例生成，为下游应用提供了实用解决方案。

title: Towards Principled Dataset Distillation: A Spectral Distribution Perspective
summary: Dataset distillation (DD) aims to compress large-scale datasets into compact synthetic counterparts for efficient model training. However, existing DD methods exhibit substantial performance degradation on long-tailed datasets. We identify two fundamental challenges: heuristic design choices for distribution discrepancy measure and uniform treatment of imbalanced classes. To address these limitations, we propose Class-Aware Spectral Distribution Matching (CSDM), which reformulates distribution alignment via the spectrum of a well-behaved kernel function. This technique maps the original samples into frequency space, resulting in the Spectral Distribution Distance (SDD). To mitigate class imbalance, we exploit the unified form of SDD to perform amplitude-phase decomposition, which adaptively prioritizes the realism in tail classes. On CIFAR-10-LT, with 10 images per class, CSDM achieves a 14.0% improvement over state-of-the-art DD methods, with only a 5.7% performance drop when the number of images in tail classes decreases from 500 to 25, demonstrating strong stability on long-tailed data.

AI.tldr: 提出CSDM方法解决长尾数据集上的数据集蒸馏问题，通过谱分布距离和振幅相位分解，在CIFAR-10-LT上相比SOTA方法提升14.0%
AI.motivation: 现有数据集蒸馏方法在长尾数据集上性能显著下降，存在两个根本挑战：分布差异度量的启发式设计选择，以及对不平衡类别的统一处理方式
AI.method: 提出类感知谱分布匹配（CSDM），通过核函数谱重新制定分布对齐，得到谱分布距离（SDD）。利用SDD的统一形式进行振幅相位分解，自适应地优先考虑尾部类别的真实性
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10-LT上，每类10张图像时，CSDM相比最先进的数据集蒸馏方法提升14.0%。当尾部类别图像从500减少到25时，性能仅下降5.7%，在长尾数据上表现出强稳定性
AI.conclusion: CSDM通过谱分布匹配和自适应类感知机制，有效解决了长尾数据集上的数据集蒸馏问题，显著提升了性能稳定性

title: Continuous Exposure-Time Modeling for Realistic Atmospheric Turbulence Synthesis
summary: Atmospheric turbulence significantly degrades long-range imaging by introducing geometric warping and exposure-time-dependent blur, which adversely affects both visual quality and the performance of high-level vision tasks. Existing methods for synthesizing turbulence effects often oversimplify the relationship between blur and exposure-time, typically assuming fixed or binary exposure settings. This leads to unrealistic synthetic data and limited generalization capability of trained models. To address this gap, we revisit the modulation transfer function (MTF) formulation and propose a novel Exposure-Time-dependent MTF (ET-MTF) that models blur as a continuous function of exposure-time. For blur synthesis, we derive a tilt-invariant point spread function (PSF) from the ET-MTF, which, when integrated with a spatially varying blur-width field, provides a comprehensive and physically accurate characterization of turbulence-induced blur. Building on this synthesis pipeline, we construct ET-Turb, a large-scale synthetic turbulence dataset that explicitly incorporates continuous exposure-time modeling across diverse optical and atmospheric conditions. The dataset comprises 5,083 videos (2,005,835 frames), partitioned into 3,988 training and 1,095 test videos. Extensive experiments demonstrate that models trained on ET-Turb produce more realistic restorations and achieve superior generalization on real-world turbulence data compared to those trained on other datasets. The dataset is publicly available at: github.com/Jun-Wei-Zeng/ET-Turb.

AI.tldr: 提出ET-MTF模型，将大气湍流模糊建模为曝光时间的连续函数，并构建大规模合成数据集ET-Turb，显著提升湍流恢复模型的真实性和泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有湍流效应合成方法过度简化模糊与曝光时间的关系（通常假设固定或二值化曝光设置），导致合成数据不真实且训练模型泛化能力有限。
AI.method: 重新审视调制传递函数(MTF)公式，提出曝光时间依赖的MTF(ET-MTF)，将模糊建模为曝光时间的连续函数；从ET-MTF推导出倾斜不变点扩散函数(PSF)，结合空间变化的模糊宽度场，提供全面且物理准确的湍流诱导模糊表征；基于此合成流程构建大规模合成数据集ET-Turb。
AI.result: 构建了包含5,083个视频（2,005,835帧）的ET-Turb数据集，分为3,988个训练视频和1,095个测试视频；实验表明，在ET-Turb上训练的模型能产生更真实的恢复结果，并在真实湍流数据上相比其他数据集训练的模型具有更优的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 提出的ET-MTF模型和ET-Turb数据集通过连续曝光时间建模，显著提升了湍流效应合成的物理准确性和训练模型的泛化性能，为解决长距离成像中的大气湍流问题提供了有效工具。

title: An Analysis of Multi-Task Architectures for the Hierarchic Multi-Label Problem of Vehicle Model and Make Classification
summary: Most information in our world is organized hierarchically; however, many Deep Learning approaches do not leverage this semantically rich structure. Research suggests that human learning benefits from exploiting the hierarchical structure of information, and intelligent models could similarly take advantage of this through multi-task learning. In this work, we analyze the advantages and limitations of multi-task learning in a hierarchical multi-label classification problem: car make and model classification. Considering both parallel and cascaded multi-task architectures, we evaluate their impact on different Deep Learning classifiers (CNNs, Transformers) while varying key factors such as dropout rate and loss weighting to gain deeper insight into the effectiveness of this approach. The tests are conducted on two established benchmarks: StanfordCars and CompCars. We observe the effectiveness of the multi-task paradigm on both datasets, improving the performance of the investigated CNN in almost all scenarios. Furthermore, the approach yields significant improvements on the CompCars dataset for both types of models.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在多标签分类任务中利用层次结构进行多任务学习的优势，通过汽车品牌和型号分类实验验证了多任务学习能提升深度学习模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现实世界中的信息通常是层次化组织的，但许多深度学习方法未能充分利用这种语义丰富的结构。研究表明人类学习受益于利用信息的层次结构，智能模型可以通过多任务学习类似地利用这种结构。
AI.method: 在汽车品牌和型号分类的层次多标签分类问题中，分析多任务学习的优势和限制。考虑并行和级联两种多任务架构，评估它们对不同深度学习分类器（CNN、Transformer）的影响，同时改变关键因素如dropout率和损失权重。
AI.result: 在StanfordCars和CompCars两个基准数据集上的测试表明，多任务范式在两个数据集上都有效，在几乎所有场景中提升了所研究CNN的性能。此外，该方法在CompCars数据集上对两种模型都带来了显著改进。
AI.conclusion: 多任务学习在层次多标签分类问题中是有效的，能够利用信息的层次结构提升深度学习模型的性能，特别是在汽车品牌和型号分类任务中表现出显著优势。

title: Token Reduction via Local and Global Contexts Optimization for Efficient Video Large Language Models
summary: Video Large Language Models (VLLMs) demonstrate strong video understanding but suffer from inefficiency due to redundant visual tokens. Existing pruning primary targets intra-frame spatial redundancy or prunes inside the LLM with shallow-layer overhead, yielding suboptimal spatiotemporal reduction and underutilizing long-context compressibility. All of them often discard subtle yet informative context from merged or pruned tokens. In this paper, we propose a new perspective that elaborates token \textbf{A}nchors within intra-frame and inter-frame to comprehensively aggregate the informative contexts via local-global \textbf{O}ptimal \textbf{T}ransport (\textbf{AOT}). Specifically, we first establish local- and global-aware token anchors within each frame under the attention guidance, which then optimal transport aggregates the informative contexts from pruned tokens, constructing intra-frame token anchors. Then, building on the temporal frame clips, the first frame within each clip will be considered as the keyframe anchors to ensemble similar information from consecutive frames through optimal transport, while keeping distinct tokens to represent temporal dynamics, leading to efficient token reduction in a training-free manner. Extensive evaluations show that our proposed AOT obtains competitive performances across various short- and long-video benchmarks on leading video LLMs, obtaining substantial computational efficiency while preserving temporal and visual fidelity. Project webpage: \href{https://tyroneli.github.io/AOT}{AOT}.

AI.tldr: AOT提出基于局部-全局最优运输的视频token压缩方法，通过建立帧内和帧间token锚点来聚合信息，在保持视频理解性能的同时显著提升计算效率。
AI.motivation: 现有视频大语言模型存在视觉token冗余问题，现有剪枝方法主要针对帧内空间冗余或在LLM浅层进行剪枝，导致时空压缩不理想，且会丢弃合并或剪枝token中的细微但重要的上下文信息。
AI.method: 提出AOT方法：1) 在注意力指导下建立每帧的局部和全局感知token锚点，通过最优运输聚合被剪枝token的信息上下文；2) 在时间帧片段中，将每个片段的第一帧作为关键帧锚点，通过最优运输从连续帧中集成相似信息，同时保留独特token来表示时间动态，实现无需训练的高效token压缩。
AI.result: 在各种短视频和长视频基准测试中，AOT在领先的视频LLM上取得了有竞争力的性能，在保持时间和视觉保真度的同时获得了显著的计算效率提升。
AI.conclusion: AOT通过局部-全局最优运输的token锚点方法，能够全面聚合信息上下文，在无需训练的情况下实现高效的视频token压缩，为视频大语言模型提供了有效的效率优化方案。

title: UETrack: A Unified and Efficient Framework for Single Object Tracking
summary: With growing real-world demands, efficient tracking has received increasing attention. However, most existing methods are limited to RGB inputs and struggle in multi-modal scenarios. Moreover, current multi-modal tracking approaches typically use complex designs, making them too heavy and slow for resource-constrained deployment. To tackle these limitations, we propose UETrack, an efficient framework for single object tracking. UETrack demonstrates high practicality and versatility, efficiently handling multiple modalities including RGB, Depth, Thermal, Event, and Language, and addresses the gap in efficient multi-modal tracking. It introduces two key components: a Token-Pooling-based Mixture-of-Experts mechanism that enhances modeling capacity through feature aggregation and expert specialization, and a Target-aware Adaptive Distillation strategy that selectively performs distillation based on sample characteristics, reducing redundant supervision and improving performance. Extensive experiments on 12 benchmarks across 3 hardware platforms show that UETrack achieves a superior speed-accuracy trade-off compared to previous methods. For instance, UETrack-B achieves 69.2% AUC on LaSOT and runs at 163/56/60 FPS on GPU/CPU/AGX, demonstrating strong practicality and versatility. Code is available at https://github.com/kangben258/UETrack.

AI.tldr: UETrack是一个高效的多模态单目标跟踪框架，支持RGB、深度、热成像、事件和语言等多种模态，通过Token-Pooling MoE机制和自适应蒸馏策略实现了优越的速度-精度平衡。
AI.motivation: 现有跟踪方法主要局限于RGB输入，在多模态场景中表现不佳，且当前多模态跟踪方法设计复杂，计算量大，难以在资源受限的环境中部署。
AI.method: 提出UETrack框架，包含两个关键组件：1) 基于Token-Pooling的混合专家机制，通过特征聚合和专家专业化增强建模能力；2) 目标感知自适应蒸馏策略，根据样本特征选择性进行蒸馏，减少冗余监督。
AI.result: 在12个基准测试和3种硬件平台上的实验表明，UETrack实现了优越的速度-精度平衡。UETrack-B在LaSOT上达到69.2% AUC，在GPU/CPU/AGX上分别运行163/56/60 FPS。
AI.conclusion: UETrack是一个实用且通用的高效多模态跟踪框架，填补了高效多模态跟踪的空白，在多种硬件平台上都表现出色。

title: UniTalking: A Unified Audio-Video Framework for Talking Portrait Generation
summary: While state-of-the-art audio-video generation models like Veo3 and Sora2 demonstrate remarkable capabilities, their closed-source nature makes their architectures and training paradigms inaccessible. To bridge this gap in accessibility and performance, we introduce UniTalking, a unified, end-to-end diffusion framework for generating high-fidelity speech and lip-synchronized video. At its core, our framework employs Multi-Modal Transformer Blocks to explicitly model the fine-grained temporal correspondence between audio and video latent tokens via a shared self-attention mechanism. By leveraging powerful priors from a pre-trained video generation model, our framework ensures state-of-the-art visual fidelity while enabling efficient training. Furthermore, UniTalking incorporates a personalized voice cloning capability, allowing the generation of speech in a target style from a brief audio reference. Qualitative and quantitative results demonstrate that our method produces highly realistic talking portraits, achieving superior performance over existing open-source approaches in lip-sync accuracy, audio naturalness, and overall perceptual quality.

AI.tldr: UniTalking是一个开源的端到端扩散框架，用于生成高质量语音和唇部同步视频，通过多模态Transformer块显式建模音频视频对应关系，并支持个性化语音克隆。
AI.motivation: 现有先进的音频视频生成模型（如Veo3和Sora2）是闭源的，其架构和训练范式不可访问。为了弥补这种可访问性和性能差距，需要开发开源替代方案。
AI.method: 采用统一的端到端扩散框架，使用多模态Transformer块通过共享自注意力机制显式建模音频和视频潜在标记之间的细粒度时间对应关系。利用预训练视频生成模型的强大先验知识，并集成个性化语音克隆功能。
AI.result: 方法能够生成高度逼真的说话人像，在唇部同步准确性、音频自然度和整体感知质量方面优于现有的开源方法。
AI.conclusion: UniTalking提供了一个开源的高性能音频视频生成框架，填补了闭源模型的可访问性空白，在多个关键指标上达到最先进水平。

title: Non-verbal Real-time Human-AI Interaction in Constrained Robotic Environments
summary: We study the ongoing debate regarding the statistical fidelity of AI-generated data compared to human-generated data in the context of non-verbal communication using full body motion. Concretely, we ask if contemporary generative models move beyond surface mimicry to participate in the silent, but expressive dialogue of body language. We tackle this question by introducing the first framework that generates a natural non-verbal interaction between Human and AI in real-time from 2D body keypoints. Our experiments utilize four lightweight architectures which run at up to 100 FPS on an NVIDIA Orin Nano, effectively closing the perception-action loop needed for natural Human-AI interaction. We trained on 437 human video clips and demonstrated that pretraining on synthetically-generated sequences reduces motion errors significantly, without sacrificing speed. Yet, a measurable reality gap persists. When the best model is evaluated on keypoints extracted from cutting-edge text-to-video systems, such as SORA and VEO, we observe that performance drops on SORA-generated clips. However, it degrades far less on VEO, suggesting that temporal coherence, not image fidelity, drives real-world performance. Our results demonstrate that statistically distinguishable differences persist between Human and AI motion.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了AI生成与人类生成的非语言身体动作数据的统计保真度差异，开发了首个从2D关键点实时生成人机非语言交互的框架，发现AI生成动作与人类动作在统计上仍存在可区分的差异。
AI.motivation: 研究动机是探讨当代生成模型是否超越了表面模仿，能够真正参与身体语言的无声表达对话，评估AI生成的非语言身体动作数据与人类数据的统计保真度差异。
AI.method: 提出了首个从2D身体关键点实时生成人机非语言交互的框架，使用四种轻量级架构（在NVIDIA Orin Nano上可达100 FPS），在437个人类视频片段上训练，并采用合成生成序列进行预训练以减少运动误差。
AI.result: 合成序列预训练显著减少了运动误差而不牺牲速度，但现实差距仍然存在。在SORA和VEO等先进文本到视频系统生成的关键点上评估时，SORA生成片段的性能下降，而VEO下降较少，表明时间一致性而非图像保真度驱动实际性能。
AI.conclusion: AI生成的运动与人类运动在统计上仍存在可区分的差异，时间一致性比图像保真度对实际性能更重要，这为评估生成模型的非语言交流能力提供了新框架。

title: SeaVIS: Sound-Enhanced Association for Online Audio-Visual Instance Segmentation
summary: Recently, an audio-visual instance segmentation (AVIS) task has been introduced, aiming to identify, segment and track individual sounding instances in videos. However, prevailing methods primarily adopt the offline paradigm, that cannot associate detected instances across consecutive clips, making them unsuitable for real-world scenarios that involve continuous video streams. To address this limitation, we introduce SeaVIS, the first online framework designed for audio-visual instance segmentation. SeaVIS leverages the Causal Cross Attention Fusion (CCAF) module to enable efficient online processing, which integrates visual features from the current frame with the entire audio history under strict causal constraints. A major challenge for conventional VIS methods is that appearance-based instance association fails to distinguish between an object's sounding and silent states, resulting in the incorrect segmentation of silent objects. To tackle this, we employ an Audio-Guided Contrastive Learning (AGCL) strategy to generate instance prototypes that encode not only visual appearance but also sounding activity. In this way, instances preserved during per-frame prediction that do not emit sound can be effectively suppressed during instance association process, thereby significantly enhancing the audio-following capability of SeaVIS. Extensive experiments conducted on the AVISeg dataset demonstrate that SeaVIS surpasses existing state-of-the-art models across multiple evaluation metrics while maintaining a competitive inference speed suitable for real-time processing.

AI.tldr: SeaVIS是首个在线音频-视觉实例分割框架，通过因果交叉注意力融合模块和音频引导对比学习策略，在连续视频流中实时识别、分割和跟踪发声实例。
AI.motivation: 现有音频-视觉实例分割方法主要采用离线范式，无法在连续视频流中关联跨片段的检测实例，且传统视觉实例分割方法无法区分物体的发声和静默状态。
AI.method: 1. 因果交叉注意力融合(CCAF)模块：在严格因果约束下将当前帧的视觉特征与完整音频历史融合，实现高效在线处理。2. 音频引导对比学习(AGCL)策略：生成编码视觉外观和发声活动的实例原型，在实例关联过程中有效抑制不发声的实例。
AI.result: 在AVISeg数据集上的大量实验表明，SeaVIS在多个评估指标上超越了现有最先进模型，同时保持了适合实时处理的竞争性推理速度。
AI.conclusion: SeaVIS是首个在线音频-视觉实例分割框架，通过因果处理和音频引导的实例关联，显著提升了在连续视频流中跟踪发声实例的能力，适合现实世界的实时应用场景。

title: DOCFORGE-BENCH: A Comprehensive Benchmark for Document Forgery Detection and Analysis
summary: We present DOCFORGE-BENCH, the first unified zero-shot benchmark for document forgery detection, evaluating 14 methods across eight datasets spanning text tampering, receipt forgery, and identity document manipulation. Unlike fine-tuning-oriented evaluations such as ForensicHub [Du et al., 2025], DOCFORGE-BENCH applies all methods with their published pretrained weights and no domain adaptation -- a deliberate design choice that reflects the realistic deployment scenario where practitioners lack labeled document training data. Our central finding is a pervasive calibration failure invisible under single-threshold protocols: methods achieve moderate Pixel-AUC (>=0.76) yet near-zero Pixel-F1. This AUC-F1 gap is not a discrimination failure but a score-distribution shift: tampered regions occupy only 0.27-4.17% of pixels in document images -- an order of magnitude less than in natural image benchmarks -- making the standard tau=0.5 threshold catastrophically miscalibrated. Oracle-F1 is 2-10x higher than fixed-threshold Pixel-F1, confirming that calibration, not representation, is the bottleneck. A controlled calibration experiment validates this: adapting a single threshold on N=10 domain images recovers 39-55% of the Oracle-F1 gap, demonstrating that threshold adaptation -- not retraining -- is the key missing step for practical deployment. Overall, no evaluated method works reliably out-of-the-box on diverse document types, underscoring that document forgery detection remains an unsolved problem. We further note that all eight datasets predate the era of generative AI editing; benchmarks covering diffusion- and LLM-based document forgeries represent a critical open gap on the modern attack surface.

AI.tldr: DOCFORGE-BENCH是首个统一的零样本文档伪造检测基准，评估了14种方法在8个数据集上的表现，发现现有方法存在严重的校准失败问题，在真实部署场景中无法可靠工作。
AI.motivation: 现有文档伪造检测评估主要关注微调性能，而实际部署场景中，从业者往往缺乏标注的训练数据。需要建立一个反映真实零样本部署场景的统一基准，揭示现有方法的实际局限性。
AI.method: 创建DOCFORGE-BENCH基准，涵盖文本篡改、收据伪造和身份证件操纵三大类文档伪造。使用14种方法的已发布预训练权重，在8个数据集上进行零样本评估，不进行任何领域适应。采用Pixel-AUC和Pixel-F1等指标，特别关注校准问题。
AI.result: 发现普遍存在的校准失败：方法在Pixel-AUC上表现中等（≥0.76），但Pixel-F1接近零。这不是判别能力失败，而是分数分布偏移问题——文档图像中篡改区域仅占0.27-4.17%的像素。Oracle-F1比固定阈值Pixel-F1高2-10倍，表明校准而非表征是瓶颈。仅用10张领域图像调整单个阈值就能恢复39-55%的Oracle-F1差距。
AI.conclusion: 文档伪造检测仍是一个未解决的问题，现有方法在多样化文档类型上无法可靠地开箱即用。阈值适应而非重新训练是实际部署的关键缺失步骤。所有数据集都早于生成式AI编辑时代，覆盖扩散和LLM基文档伪造的基准是现代攻击面的关键开放缺口。

title: Unifying Language-Action Understanding and Generation for Autonomous Driving
summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models are emerging as a promising paradigm for end-to-end autonomous driving, valued for their potential to leverage world knowledge and reason about complex driving scenes. However, existing methods suffer from two critical limitations: a persistent misalignment between language instructions and action outputs, and the inherent inefficiency of typical auto-regressive action generation. In this paper, we introduce LinkVLA, a novel architecture that directly addresses these challenges to enhance both alignment and efficiency. First, we establish a structural link by unifying language and action tokens into a shared discrete codebook, processed within a single multi-modal model. This structurally enforces cross-modal consistency from the ground up. Second, to create a deep semantic link, we introduce an auxiliary action understanding objective that trains the model to generate descriptive captions from trajectories, fostering a bidirectional language-action mapping. Finally, we replace the slow, step-by-step generation with a two-step coarse-to-fine generation method C2F that efficiently decodes the action sequence, saving 86% inference time. Experiments on closed-loop driving benchmarks show consistent gains in instruction following accuracy and driving performance, alongside reduced inference latency.

AI.tldr: LinkVLA提出了一种新的VLA架构，通过共享离散码本统一语言和动作token，引入动作理解目标建立双向语义映射，并采用粗到细的两步生成方法，显著提升指令对齐和推理效率。
AI.motivation: 现有VLA模型存在两个关键问题：语言指令与动作输出之间的持续不对齐，以及自回归动作生成的固有低效率。这些问题限制了VLA模型在自动驾驶中的实际应用效果。
AI.method: 1. 结构链接：将语言和动作token统一到共享离散码本中，在单一多模态模型内处理；2. 语义链接：引入辅助动作理解目标，训练模型从轨迹生成描述性标题，建立双向语言-动作映射；3. 高效生成：采用粗到细的两步生成方法C2F，替代缓慢的逐步生成。
AI.result: 在闭环驾驶基准测试中，该方法在指令跟随准确性和驾驶性能方面取得一致提升，同时推理延迟显著降低，推理时间节省86%。
AI.conclusion: LinkVLA通过结构链接、语义链接和高效生成机制，有效解决了VLA模型中的对齐和效率问题，为端到端自动驾驶提供了更优的解决方案。

title: Deepfake Forensics Adapter: A Dual-Stream Network for Generalizable Deepfake Detection
summary: The rapid advancement of deepfake generation techniques poses significant threats to public safety and causes societal harm through the creation of highly realistic synthetic facial media. While existing detection methods demonstrate limitations in generalizing to emerging forgery patterns, this paper presents Deepfake Forensics Adapter (DFA), a novel dual-stream framework that synergizes vision-language foundation models with targeted forensics analysis. Our approach integrates a pre-trained CLIP model with three core components to achieve specialized deepfake detection by leveraging the powerful general capabilities of CLIP without changing CLIP parameters: 1) A Global Feature Adapter is used to identify global inconsistencies in image content that may indicate forgery, 2) A Local Anomaly Stream enhances the model's ability to perceive local facial forgery cues by explicitly leveraging facial structure priors, and 3) An Interactive Fusion Classifier promotes deep interaction and fusion between global and local features using a transformer encoder. Extensive evaluations of frame-level and video-level benchmarks demonstrate the superior generalization capabilities of DFA, particularly achieving state-of-the-art performance in the challenging DFDC dataset with frame-level AUC/EER of 0.816/0.256 and video-level AUC/EER of 0.836/0.251, representing a 4.8% video AUC improvement over previous methods. Our framework not only demonstrates state-of-the-art performance, but also points out a feasible and effective direction for developing a robust deepfake detection system with enhanced generalization capabilities against the evolving deepfake threats. Our code is available at https://github.com/Liao330/DFA.git

AI.tldr: 提出Deepfake Forensics Adapter (DFA)框架，结合视觉-语言基础模型与针对性取证分析，通过全局特征适配器、局部异常流和交互融合分类器实现专业化的深度伪造检测，在DFDC数据集上达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 深度伪造生成技术的快速发展对公共安全构成重大威胁，现有检测方法在泛化到新兴伪造模式方面存在局限，需要更鲁棒的检测系统。
AI.method: 提出双流框架DFA，集成预训练CLIP模型与三个核心组件：1)全局特征适配器识别图像内容全局不一致性；2)局部异常流利用面部结构先验增强局部伪造线索感知；3)交互融合分类器使用Transformer编码器促进全局和局部特征的深度交互融合。
AI.result: 在帧级和视频级基准测试中表现出优越的泛化能力，在DFDC数据集上达到帧级AUC/EER 0.816/0.256和视频级AUC/EER 0.836/0.251，视频AUC比先前方法提升4.8%。
AI.conclusion: DFA不仅展示了最先进的性能，还为开发具有增强泛化能力的鲁棒深度伪造检测系统指明了可行有效的方向，能够应对不断演变的深度伪造威胁。

title: physfusion: A Transformer-based Dual-Stream Radar and Vision Fusion Framework for Open Water Surface Object Detection
summary:
Detecting water-surface targets for Unmanned Surface Vehicles (USVs) is challenging due to wave clutter,
  specular reflections, and weak appearance cues in long-range observations. Although 4D millimeter-wave
  radar complements cameras under degraded illumination, maritime radar point clouds are sparse and
  intermittent, with reflectivity attributes exhibiting heavy-tailed variations under scattering and
  multipath, making conventional fusion designs struggle to exploit radar cues effectively.
  We propose PhysFusion, a physics-informed radar-image detection framework for water-surface perception.
  The framework integrates: (1) a Physics-Informed Radar Encoder (PIR Encoder) with an RCS Mapper and
  Quality Gate, transforming per-point radar attributes into compact scattering priors and predicting
  point-wise reliability for robust feature learning under clutter; (2) a Radar-guided Interactive Fusion
  Module (RIFM) performing query-level radar-image fusion between semantically enriched radar features and
  multi-scale visual features, with the radar branch modeled by a dual-stream backbone including a
  point-based local stream and a transformer-based global stream using Scattering-Aware Self-Attention
  (SASA); and (3) a Temporal Query Aggregation module (TQA) aggregating frame-wise fused queries over a
  short temporal window for temporally consistent representations.
  Experiments on WaterScenes and FLOW demonstrate that PhysFusion achieves 59.7% mAP50:95 and 90.3% mAP50
  on WaterScenes (T=5 radar history) using 5.6M parameters and 12.5G FLOPs, and reaches 94.8% mAP50 and
